title: Real Estate Inside Sales Agent (ISA)
description:
About Us:



The Slavis Group is a fast-growing real estate team based in the United States (Washington, DC). We are looking for a motivated and experienced Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to join our team and help convert inbound and outbound leads into qualified appointments for our agents.



This role is focused on lead follow-up, outbound calling, and appointment setting using our CRM and dialer system.



Responsibilities:



- Make outbound and follow-up calls to real estate leads

- Qualify buyers and sellers through phone conversations

- Set appointments for real estate agents

- Follow up consistently with internet leads and existing contacts

- Manage and update lead information in our CRM (FollowUpBoss)

- Use our integrated dialer to make high-volume calls

- Track conversations, notes, and follow-up tasks in the CRM

- Nurture leads who are not yet ready to transact

- Maintain consistent communication with the team regarding lead progress



Requirements:



- Fluent English (spoken and written)

- Previous experience as a Real Estate ISA

- Online sales experience

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Strong phone presence and communication skills

- Experience using a CRM (FollowUpBoss experience is a plus)

- Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

- Highly organized and able to manage multiple follow-ups

- Must be available to work during U.S. Eastern Standard Time (EST) hours



What We're Looking For:



- Someone confident on the phone

- Strong ability to build rapport quickly

- Results-driven and consistent with follow-ups

- Comfortable handling objections and qualifying leads

- A team player who is reliable and accountable

title: Remote Home Care Medical Billing Specialist
description:
We are seeking an experienced Home Care Medical Billing Specialist for a remote freelance/contract position to support our growing home care agency. The ideal candidate must have direct experience with home care billing and Electronic Visit Verification (EVV) systems.

This role is best suited for someone who understands the full billing cycle in a home care setting, including claim submission, authorization tracking, EVV reconciliation, denial follow-up, and payer communication.



Responsibilities:

Review and reconcile caregiver visits using EVV

Verify visit data, billing units, and service authorizations before claim submission

Prepare and submit accurate claims for home care services

Track and follow up on unpaid claims, denials, rejections, and underpayments

Post payments and adjustments accurately

Review authorizations and ensure billed services match approved hours and payer requirements

Identify missing or incorrect documentation that may delay billing

Coordinate with internal staff regarding visit issues, missing data, or billing discrepancies

Maintain accurate billing records and support audit readiness

Help improve billing workflow and reduce delays in collections



Required Qualifications

***MUST HAVE Prior experience in home care medical billing ***

Required experience working with EVV systems

Experience with Medicaid, managed care, or waiver-based billing

Strong understanding of claims submission, rejections, denials, and accounts receivable follow-up

Ability to work independently and accurately in a remote environment

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Strong communication skills



Preferred Qualifications

Experience with platforms such as Alora, Sandata, HHAeXchange, WellSky/ClearCare, or similar

Experience with personal care, supportive home care, or non-medical home care billing

Familiarity with authorization-based billing and caregiver visit reconciliation

Experience supporting U.S.-based home care agencies



What We Are Looking For

We are looking for someone who can step in remotely, understand our billing workflow, identify issues quickly, and help ensure claims are submitted cleanly and on time. You should be comfortable working with EVV data, resolving billing problems, and helping keep revenue flowing efficiently.

To Apply

Please include:

A summary of your home care billing experience

Which EVV systems you have worked with

Which billing software/platforms you have used

Your experience with Medicaid or managed care claims

Your hourly rate or project rate

Your availability



Typical week:



• Enter charges and verify documentation is complete and compliant  

• Transmit claims daily and monitor clearinghouse acknowledgments  

• Track aging, post remits, resolve denials, and escalate anything over 30 days  

• Produce concise weekly A/R and denial-trend reports for me and the accountant  

• Answer occasional patient or payer questions with professionalism and empathy





1. Clean claim submission within two business days of visit lock  

2. Weekly aging report showing total outstanding and movement by bucket  

3. Denial resolution log with root-cause notes and corrective action  

4. Month-end reconciliation that matches EMR totals to bank deposits within a 1% margin



If you have the discipline to manage a steady 40-hour schedule from home and a track record of keeping DSO tight in a home-health setting, I’d like to hear how you would hit the ground running.

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

- Copy/paste links to each content piece

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Add precise video instructions on how each piece can be replicated



TASK #2: Provide Strategic Content Direction



- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed



TASK #3: Administrative Responsibilities



- Maintain a content library categorized by niche for efficient future use

- Complete daily End-of-Day Reports (EOD)

- Attend multiple meetings with your manager each week

- Continuously improve content recommendations based on what works



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above - non-negotiable!)

- Previous experience in content creation is a MUST

- Experience in content research and trend analysis

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Ability to provide clear, actionable instructions

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Complete our application form and record a personal introduction:



Fill out the form: 
/to/QRoz4WLV



Note: Put "CRE" + [Your Name & Family Name] in the "Name" field in the form.

title: Test Analyst - Remote
description:
We are seeking a detail-focused Test Analyst to support the quality and reliability of our core business systems. In this role, you will help ensure that enterprise applications function as expected by applying structured testing approaches across multiple stages of the development lifecycle.



The ideal candidate brings a solid IT foundation, strong knowledge of both the software development lifecycle (SDLC) and software testing lifecycle (STLC), and the ability to analyze systems thoroughly to identify potential issues before release.



Key Responsibilities:

- Test Planning and Preparation

- Collaborate with business analysts and developers to define testing strategies

- Develop detailed test plans and test cases for new implementations and system enhancements

- Test Execution and Defect Management

- Perform testing across multiple phases including system, integration, regression, and UAT

- Record and track defects, ensuring issues are resolved before release

- Provide regular updates on testing progress and results

- Enterprise System Validation

- Perform thorough testing of ERP systems and related business workflows

- Integration and Data Testing

- Verify data exchanges and message accuracy when testing EDI transactions and API endpoints

- Database Validation

- Use SQL queries to validate backend data and confirm database accuracy

- Continuous Improvement

- Recommend improvements to testing practices, coverage, and overall efficiency



Required Qualifications:

- Minimum 3 years of experience in software testing

- ISTQB Foundation Level certification or higher

- Strong knowledge of system, integration, and regression testing approaches

- Experience testing ERP platforms and EDI integrations/message formats

- Practical experience performing API testing

- Ability to write and execute SQL queries for backend validation

- Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills



Preferred Experience:

- Experience conducting performance testing, including load, stress, or volume testing

- Experience creating and maintaining test automation scripts using Java



Work Schedule :

6:30 AM - 3:00 PM Philippines Time

title: HIRING! Google Media Buyer (High-budget eCommerce experience only)
description:
This is NOT an entry-level role.

We are only considering experienced eCommerce performance marketers who have managed large product catalogs and high monthly ad spend.





Help scale brands. Own performance. Drive real revenue.

GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where great ideas don’t sit in slides — they turn into real, measurable growth. We build and scale online brands across international markets, and our tea
mbers take real ownership, grow fast, and help shape the future of the company.



We’re now looking for a performance-driven Google Ads Media Buyer to help take our main revenue channel to the next level.





Please Do NOT Apply If:

- You have never managed $300K+ per month in Google Ads spend

- You have not handled Google Shopping for 10,000+ SKUs

- Your experience is mostly lead gen or small-budget accounts

- You rely on basic campaign setups without deep feed optimization

- You are not comfortable being accountable for revenue performance



We respect your time — and ours.





Why This Role Is Critical

This role plays a meaningful part in the growth of the company.



As a Google Ads Media Buyer, you’ll directly contribute to improving the performance of our Google Ads channel, which drives around 90% of our total revenue, while developing your skills in a performance-driven environment. You’ll help elevate our campaign structure, strategy, and overall account performance, ensuring our ad spend translates into scalable and profitable growth.



This role is ideal for someone who wants to fully own the performance of an account, build systems that improve efficiency, and drive measurable business impact.



What You’ll Own 7 Build

In this role, you’ll be trusted with real responsibility from day one. Your success will be measured in your first 90 days based on the following metrics:

- Developing and implementing a new or improved Google Ads strategy

- Restructuring and optimizing Google Shopping and PMAX campaigns for better scalability and efficiency

- Driving measurable performance improvements that result in a 20%+ increase in revenue from Google Ads

- Taking full ownership of Google Ads accounts, including campaign structure, bidding strategy, and feed optimization

- Building automation systems, scripts, or workflows that improve campaign efficiency and reduce manual work

- Using data insights to continuously refine bidding strategies, segmentation, and feed performance



What We’re Looking For

We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has 3+ years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads for eCommerce

- Has direct experience managing large Google Shopping accounts (10,000+ products)

- Has personally managed Google Ads accounts end-to-end, including strategy, optimization, and performance analysis

- Has experience handling high-budget campaigns ($300K+ monthly ad spend)

- Is comfortable owning and managing accounts independently (excluding creative production)

- Has experience building or implementing automations (scripts, feed rules, automation workflows, or similar tools)

- Has strong expertise in Google Ads, Google Merchant Center, and Google Analytics

- Ideally has experience with Google CSS Labelizer

- Thinks analytically, enjoys testing and optimizing campaigns, and is comfortable being accountable for revenue impact



Only apply if you meet the above requirements. We’re building a high-performance team, and this role requires proven experience with large-scale eCommerce campaigns.



Hiring Process

Shortlisted candidates will complete a 19-minute Google Ads knowledge assessment to validate hands-on expertise before moving to the HR interview.



Ready to Make an Impact?

If you’re someone who loves ownership, thrives on measurable results, and wants your work to matter, we want to hear from you.

s, reports, and documentation

Skills & Experience

• Strong Microsoft Word document formatting skills

• Working knowledge of Excel and PowerPoint

• Experience using HubSpot CRM or similar CRM systems

• Strong administrative and organisational skills

Remote Work Requirements

• Backup internet connection required

• Dedicated quiet workspace suitable for remote work

• Professional headset with microphone

• Reliable computer capable of supporting full-time remote work



Salary & Benefits



• ?35,000 – ?45,000 per month depending on experience

• Performance-based incentives

• Full-time remote role

• Supportive Australian management team

• Continuous professional development

• Long-term opportunity with potential progression to senior roles



Application Requirement (Mandatory Video)



To progress your application, you must submit a 2-minute video.

Applications without a video will not be reviewed.



Your video must include:



• Screen sharing ON for the entire video

• Your face visible in the bottom-right corner (picture-in-picture)



We must be able to see your screen, mouse movements, and you presenting at the same time.



Video Task (Choose ONE option)



Option 1 – Respond to a Client



Open a new
 or Word document and demonstrate how you would write a professional response to a client asking for help using a software (SaaS) system.



Option 2 – Explain a Software Process

Submission Requirements

Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be considered.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
About Vibefam

Vibefam is a fast-growing SaaS platform purpose-built for boutique fitness studios and gyms. We give fitness entrepreneurs — from Pilates studios to martial arts academies — everything they need to run and grow their business in one place: class scheduling, automated payments, membership management, lead capture, referral marketing, and an AI-powered business dashboard that works like a 24/7 business strategist.



Founded in Singapore in 2020 and backed by BLOCK71 and Hustle Fund, we serve 50,000+ users across Singapore, Malaysia, Hong Kong, Vietnam, and beyond. Our clients grow an average of 50% in their first six months with us — and they stay because we make their lives genuinely easier.



We're now taking Vibefam to the US and Canada, and we need driven SDRs to help us bring our product to the fitness studios that need it most.



The Role

As our Sales Development Representative, you will be the first point of contact for fitness studio owners across the US and Canada. Your mission is simple: start the conversation, build genuine interest in Vibefam, and secure qualified sales appointments for our Account Executives. You will not be closing deals, but you will be the face and voice that makes those deals possible.



Key Responsibilities: 

- Outbound Prospecting

- Make 80–100 cold calls per day to boutique fitness studio owners and operators in the US and Canada

- Research each prospect before calling to personalise your pitch — understand their studio type, size, current software, pain points, and growth goals

- Clearly articulate Vibefam's value proposition and product USPs in a compelling, tailored manner

- Qualify prospects and secure a minimum of 12 sales appointments per month

- Follow-Up & Appointment Management

- Independently draft and send personalised follow-up
s and text messages to high-intent prospects

- Send timely appointment reminders to maximise show-up rates

- Respond to prospect questions via
 or text in a professional and knowledgeable manner

- Performance & Reporting

- Participate in bi-weekly sync-ups with your manager to review performance metrics, share insights, and refine your approach

- Maintain accurate records of all outreach activities, call notes, and prospect status

- Continuously improve pitch quality based on feedback and performance data



What Success Looks Like

- 12 sales appointments per month



What We're Looking For



Must-Haves

- Excellent spoken and written English, with a neutral or easily understood accent

- Comfortable making a high volume of cold calls each day — resilient and persistent by nature

- Strong research skills — able to gather and use relevant prospect information to personalise outreach

- Ability to independently compose professional, concise follow-up
s and text messages

- Self-motivated and accountable — able to work independently and maintain productivity during US business hours

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional work environment at home



Nice-to-Haves

- Prior experience in BPO, outbound sales, or SDR roles

- Familiarity with the fitness or wellness industry

- Experience using CRM tools (e.g. HubSpot, Salesforce) or sales dialers

- Demonstrated track record of meeting or exceeding outbound targets



Contract Details

- 3-month fixed term contract, with an opportunity for full-time conversion based on performance at the end of the contract

- Remote

- US business hours (EST or PST) 

- Commission-based incentive paid above base salary

title: Recruiter for Media Company
description:
Job Posting & Sourcing

- Post and manage job listings across internal and external job boards, ensuring all postings comply with relevant federal and local requirements

- Proactively source candidates through job boards, communities, LinkedIn, social media, direct outreach, and referrals

- Keep all postings up to date and accurate; remove, refresh, or repost as needed based on pipeline status

- Maintain a warm pool of pre-screened candidates so active roles can be filled without starting from zero



Screening & Interview Coordination

- Conduct initial screening of applicants: resume review, application responses, and first-round evaluation against role criteria defined by the Senior Recruitment Manager

- Schedule interviews between candidates and hiring managers; ensure all parties have the right information, materials, and context in advance

- Assist in the preparation of interview questions, scoring rubrics, and evaluation materials in collaboration with the Senior Recruitment Manager

- Administer trial tasks to shortlisted candidates; track submissions, flag issues, and compile results for evaluation

- Maintain accurate, up-to-date candidate records throughout the hiring process



Offer & Onboarding Support

- Collaborate with the Senior Recruitment Manager and seniors, YouTube producers during the offer process, including - 

- flagging salary benchmarks, proposed start dates, and offer details for review

- Coordinate offer communications with selected candidates and manage responses

- Support onboarding logistics for new hires: checklists, first-day setup, document collection, and handoff to the relevant team lead



Must Have

- 1+ years of hands-on experience in recruiting, talent acquisition, or HR coordination with measurable results

- Proven ability to manage multiple open roles simultaneously without losing track of candidates or timelines

- Strong sourcing skills: you know how to find candidates across job boards, communities, and direct outreach — not just wait for applications

- Solid screening instincts: you can evaluate whether a candidate is worth moving forward, not just check that boxes are ticked

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail — pipeline tracking, scheduling, and follow-ups are error-free

- Fast, reliable communicator with candidates and internal stakeholders

- Self-managing: you do not need daily direction to know what needs to be done



Nice to Have

- Experience hiring for YouTube, media production, or creative/content roles

- Familiarity with remote and globally distributed team hiring

title: Sell-by-Chat Lead Generation  Specialist
description:
Fill out this application form to apply:





Role: Sell-By-Chat Specialist (DM Setter)

Company: Thrive Academy

Location: Remote (Philippines or LATAM)

Reports to: SBC Lead / Enrollment Project Manager / Client Care Manager



Compensation

Base: $4 USD/hour (full-time)



Performance bonuses:

$8 per qualified booked call during Summits

$20 per Summit sign-up you directly influence (offer made in GHL)

$50 per Client Attraction Code sign-up



Weekly stackers:

$50 for 10 Summit/Code sign-ups in 1 week

$100 for 15 in 1 week

$200 for 20 in 1 week



Paid monthly via invoice



Highest earning periods are the 3 Challenge + Summit sprints per year to warm leads



Schedule



Member-only phases: ~6 hours/day, 5 days/week (no weekend events)

Challenge + Summit phases: 5 days/week, often 8–10 hour days, rotating days off

Summit days: typically Fri–Sun, ~8 AM – 7 PM Pacific



You must be available for 3 sprint cycles per year and happy with lighter days between them.



Mission



Your #1 job is to turn warm leads and existing members into:



Client Attraction Summit registrations during our “Book 5 Consults in 5 Days” Challenges

Booked calls during each 3-Day Client Attraction Summit

Engaged, successful members between launches (usage, re-engagement, A/R cleanup, concierge calls)



All conversations happen inside our GoHighLevel (GHL) account (chat,
, SMS, social DMs are routed there).



Our Year (Quadramesters)



We run 3 quadramesters per year (each quad = 17 weeks). Each quad follows this pattern:



Phase A – Member Engagement (weeks 0–6)



Lighter hours (about 6 hours/day, 5 days/week)



100% focused on existing members only:



Encouraging attendance to onboarding, member calls, member challenges, engagement with program, coaching calls, and member events

Re-engaging members who went quiet

Booking concierge calls for members struggling in the program or A/R cases



Phase B – Challenge + Summit Sprint (weeks 6–16)



~10 weeks of Book 5 Consults in 5 Days Challenges that culminate in the Client Attraction Summit (6-day window including pre & post Summit)



Heavier days (often 8–10 hours, rotating days off) with higher commission opportunity



Phase C – Post-Summit Member Re-Engagement (week 17)



Hours taper back down



Return to member outreach and reactivation only until the next quad starts



Core Responsibilities (by Phase)



Phase A & C – Member Engagement (no Summits)



Use GHL integrated inbox for conversations to:



Check in on members, encourage call attendance, challenges, and events

Re-engage quiet members with supportive, action-oriented messages



Book concierge calls for:

Members in A/R

Members stuck in the program



Tag and move members through our engagement pipelines in GHL



Track and report: outreach volume, replies, reactivated members



Phase B1 – Challenge Season (Book 5 Consults in 5 Days)



All chats in integrated GHL inbox (even if source is FB/IG/email/SMS)



Support challenge participants:



Welcome, answer questions, celebrate Quest completions

Acknowledge stuck points and guide them through the experience



Primary goal: Fill the Client Attraction Summit



Invite and register qualified challenge participants into Summit



Follow up with non-action takers to increase Summit sign-ups



Rare exception: if someone cannot attend Summit and asks about Platinum, route to consult per script



Phase B2 – Summit Window (3-Day Summit + pre/post days)



Support Summit coaches (enrollers) in their GHL texts/emails/chats



Run your own chats with attendees to:



Answer FAQs / basic objections

Warm them and naturally transition to booking enrollment calls



Primary goal:

Book qualified calls for the enrollment team



Keep GHL pipelines clean so every lead is owned and followed up with



KPIs



We track and coach you on:



Member phases:



Outreach volume in GHL

Response rate

Reactivated members / A/R resolved



Challenge phases:



Summit registrations from challenge participants

Challenge engagement chats started and continued



Summit phases:



Enrollment calls booked from Summit attendees



Requirements



1–3+ years experience in DM / chat-based sales, conversational selling, or DM engagement

C2 English proficiency (essential) for emotional nuance and personalized communication

Experience managing conversations inside a CRM or chat hub (GHL, HubSpot, etc.) preferred

Comfortable managing high-volume chat conversations

Ability to personalize messages quickly rather than relying only on scripts

Confident daily user of ChatGPT and AI-assisted communication tools

Warm, human-centered communication style

Fast typing and quick comprehension

Organized, reliable, and detail-oriented

Calm under pressure and emotionally intelligent

Able to follow structured systems and prioritize effectively

Strong team player with initiative



Reliable internet + backup required.

Must be able to work long PST hours and weekends during Summit events.

title: AI Automation Specialist - E-commerce (n8n, Make, Zapier)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company looking to supercharge our operations with AI automations. We need an AI automation specialist who can build powerful customer service automations and streamline our team's processes using the latest AI tools while also having the knowledge to custom code yourself.



What you'll do:

• Build and implement customer service automations

• Create workflow automations using n8n to optimize our team's daily processes

• Develop custom automations with Make, Zapier, Manus, Claude Code and more.

• Write custom code solutions when pre-built tools aren't enough

• Stay current with the newest AI tools and recommend implementations for our business

• Test, troubleshoot, and optimize automation workflows for maximum efficiency



What we're looking for:

• At least 6 months of hands-on AI automation experience

• Expert-level knowledge of n8n, Make, Zapier, Manus, and Claude Code

• Strong custom coding abilities (Python, JavaScript, or similar)

• Proven experience creating automations for e-commerce companies

• Deep understanding of customer service automation workflows

• Someone who actively follows and experiments with the latest AI tools



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'AISpecialist'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Walk me through a specific CS automation you built for an e-commerce company using n8n. What triggers did you use, what APIs did you connect, and what was the end result?

2. Describe a complex workflow automation you created that required custom coding. What tools did you use, what code did you write, and how did it solve the problem?

3. What's the most recent AI tool you've experimented with in the past month, and how could it be applied to e-commerce automation?

4. Tell me about a time when pre-built automation tools weren't sufficient for a project. How did you approach building a custom solution?

5. Please share at least 3 automation examples you've created for e-commerce companies or customer service workflows. Include screenshots, workflow diagrams, or videos showing your n8n automations in action.

title: Senior Para Broker / Credit Analyst – Australian Mortgage Broking
description:
Para Broker / Credit Analyst

Australian Mortgage Broking – Complex & Medical Lending

Applicants must have minimum 3 years experience analysing Australian mortgage lending scenarios.



Full-Time | Permanent | Work From Home

Salary: 70,000 – 100,000 PHP per month depending on experience



This Role Is For a Real Credit Analyst — Not a Broker Admin



We are an established Australian mortgage brokerage specialising in lending for medical professionals and complex borrowers. Our work regularly involves residential, investment, commercial, SMSF, trust structures, and high-net-worth lending.



We are looking for a genuinely experienced Para Broker or Credit Analyst who understands how to structure lending, interpret credit policy, and produce strong lender-ready applications.



This role is not suitable for applicants whose experience is primarily document collection, CRM updates, application submission only, or broker administration.



If your previous role mainly involved preparing files for submission or acting as broker support, this position will not be the right fit.



The Type of Analyst We Are Looking For



You are someone who can think like a lender, not just process paperwork.



You have experience assessing borrowing capacity and servicing, identifying suitable lenders based on credit policy, structuring deals involving trusts, SMSF or commercial borrowers, and preparing clear credit submissions that help lenders approve deals.



You enjoy solving problems and working on lending scenarios where every file is different.



Mandatory Experience Requirements



Please only apply if you meet all of the following requirements.



You must have at least 3 years experience as a Para Broker or Credit Analyst in Australian mortgage broking.



You must have experience analysing and structuring residential and investment lending.



Exposure to commercial lending, trust lending or SMSF lending is highly desirable.



You must have strong knowledge of Australian lender credit policy and excellent written and spoken English.



You must also have experience using the following platforms:



ApplyOnline (AOL)

Mercury CRM

Quickli



If you are unfamiliar with these systems, you are not qualified for this role.



What You Will Be Doing



Analysing client financials and servicing positions



Researching lender credit policy and structuring lending solutions



Recommending lenders and loan strategies to brokers



Preparing high quality credit submissions



Assisting with complex lending scenarios including SMSF and trust structures



Supporting files through to approval and settlement



You will work closely with experienced brokers who handle complex transactions, so your work will directly influence deal outcomes.



Why This Role Is Different



Many offshore roles in mortgage broking are administrative.



This role is not.



You will be working with brokers who specialise in complex and high-value lending, including medical professional lending, SMSF lending, trust lending, commercial lending, and high-net-worth borrowers.



We value intelligence, initiative, strong analytical ability and attention to detail.



If you enjoy working on challenging deals and learning advanced lending strategy, you will thrive in this environment.



What We Offer



Permanent full-time work from home role



Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm AEST



Salary between 70,000 and 100,000 PHP depending on experience



A small experienced team of high-performing brokers and analysts



Exposure to complex lending scenarios most analysts never see



We are building a long-term team and are looking for someone who wants to grow with the business.



Application Instructions (Important)



Please do not send a CV only.



Applications without the following will not be reviewed.



Record a short video introduction (2 to 4 minutes) where you:



Explain your experience as a Credit Analyst or Para Broker



Describe the types of lending scenarios you have worked on



Explain how your role differed from broker administration or loan processing



Demonstrate your spoken English communication



Upload the video to Google Drive or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application.



Failure to follow these instructions will result in automatic rejection as attention to detail is critical in this role.



If you are an experienced credit analyst who enjoys problem-solving, complex lending structures and working with high-performing professionals, we would like to hear from you.

title: Landing Page Developer for DTC Ecommerce Brands (Replo/GemPages)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company working with multiple DTC brands to create high-converting landing pages and product pages. We're looking for a skilled Landing Page Developer who can take our Figma designs and turn them into pixel-perfect, lightning-fast Shopify pages using page builders like Replo or GemPages.



What you'll do:

• Develop landing pages, product pages, homepages, and advertorials in Shopify using Replo or GemPages

• Translate Figma designs into live pages as exact 1-to-1 replicas for both desktop and mobile

• Ensure all pages load fast and are fully optimized for page speed

• Integrate Shopify apps into pages (bundle apps, swatch apps, review widgets,
 capture forms)

• Write custom HTML, CSS, and Liquid code when page builders can't achieve the desired design or functionality

• Thoroughly self-test and QA every page before delivery, ensuring zero errors or layout issues

• Take on new projects weekly across multiple brands and occasionally update existing pages



What we're looking for:

• Proven experience developing Shopify pages using Replo or GemPages

• Ability to build pixel-perfect replicas of Figma designs on both desktop and mobile

• Strong understanding of page speed optimization on Shopify

• Experience integrating third-party Shopify apps into page builder layouts

• Custom coding skills (HTML, CSS, Liquid) to solve page builder limitations

• Extreme attention to detail in both design accuracy and functionality

• Self-sufficient QA process and experience working with DTC ecommerce brands



Nice to have:

• Experience with Shopify theme development or advanced Liquid customizations

• Familiarity with conversion rate optimization principles

• Experience working across multiple brands simultaneously



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'PageBuilder429'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Do you prefer working in Replo or GemPages, and why? What are the strengths and limitations of each in your experience?

2. How many hours would it take you to develop a mid-length product page from a completed Figma design into a fully functional page in a page builder? Walk us through how you estimate this.

3. What steps do you take to ensure that the pages you build load fast on Shopify? Which tools do you use to measure and optimize page speed?

4. What happens when a Figma design includes an element or interaction that is not natively possible in a page builder? Give a specific example of how you solved this with custom code.

5. Share a minimum of 3 to 5 links to live Shopify pages you have built using a page builder, with a brief explanation of your role in each project.

title: Business Development & Proposals Coordinator
description:
We are seeking a highly organized Business Development & Proposals Coordinator to support the growth of our strategic communications and consulting firm. This role focuses on researching new opportunities, coordinating proposal development, and managing the administrative and operational systems behind our business development efforts.



You will play a critical role in helping the company identify and pursue new contracts, particularly with government agencies, foundations, and large institutions. This role requires exceptional organization, strong written communication skills, and the ability to manage complex deadlines across multiple contributors.



Key Responsibilities



Opportunity Research

• Identify and research new business opportunities, RFPs, RFQs, and grant opportunities

• Monitor government procurement portals, industry listservs, and opportunity databases

• Prepare concise summaries of opportunities including scope, deadlines, and recommendations on whether to pursue



Proposal Coordination

• Organize all administrative functions of proposal development

• Prepare outlines and proposal development plans

• Track deadlines and milestones for each proposal

• Create and manage proposal timelines in Asana

• Coordinate all internal contributors and ensure deadlines are met

• Communicate with issuing agencies regarding questions, clarifications, and submissions



Proposal Development Support

• Draft selected sections of proposals

• Format documents and ensure compliance with submission requirements

• Coordinate signatures, forms, attachments, and required documentation

• Manage final packaging and submission of proposals



Business Development Operations

• Maintain the company’s pipeline of active opportunities

• Develop and maintain proposal content libraries

• Maintain formatted staff resumes and case studies for proposals

• Track proposal submissions and outcomes



Administrative Compliance

• Maintain business certifications and licenses required for proposal eligibility

• Manage company registrations in procurement systems and vendor portals

• Maintain access credentials and compliance requirements needed for submissions



Required Skills

• Strong research and analytical skills

• Excellent written English

• Experience coordinating proposals or RFP responses

• Exceptional organization and attention to detail

• Ability to manage multiple deadlines simultaneously

• Proficiency with Google Docs, Microsoft Word, and PDF formatting

• Project management software experience (Asana strongly preferred)

• Ability to read and interpret complex instructions and requirements



Preferred Experience

• Experience supporting government proposals or grants

• Experience in consulting, communications, marketing, or professional services

• Familiarity with U.S. government procurement portals

• Proposal writing experience

• Resume and proposal formatting experience



Ideal Candidate

You are highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing complex deadlines. You enjoy research, problem-solving, and coordinating teams to produce high-quality work under pressure. You take ownership of systems, proactively identify opportunities, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

title: Systems & IT Operations Manager
description:
We are a U.S.-based strategic communications and marketing agency serving clients in public health, government, education, and social impact sectors. Our work involves complex projects, multiple systems, and strict data security requirements.



We are seeking a Systems & IT Operations Manager to own and manage the company’s technology environment including systems, apps, equipment, and websites. This role is responsible for administering company systems, maintaining security, supporting staff with technical issues, and ensuring our tools and infrastructure run smoothly.



This is not a basic help desk role. We are looking for someone who can think strategically about systems, security, and operational efficiency. This role also includes data entry and support with data collection roles as needed for active client projects.



Key Responsibilities



Systems Administration

Manage accounts, access, and configurations across company systems, including:

• Google Workspace / Google Admin

• Asana

• Apple

• Slack

• Zoom

• Microsoft 365 & Microsoft Teams

• Adobe

• Gusto

• Stipe

• SquareSpace

• GoDaddy

• MailChimp

• Whova

• IBM SPSS

• Google Drive and cloud storage systems

• Additional tools used by the agency

Responsibilities include:

• Creating and managing user accounts

• Access permissions and role management

• System configuration and maintenance

• Monitoring system updates and new features



Identity & Access Management

• Implement and maintain secure authentication protocols

• Manage role-based access permissions

• Conduct periodic access audits

• Maintain Single Sign-On (SSO) where applicable

• Enforce company password management policies and tools



Security & Data Protection

• Maintain cybersecurity best practices across all systems

• Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA)

• Monitor security alerts and suspicious activity

• Maintain data protection standards for sensitive client and company information

• Assist in i
 response if security issues arise



Backup & Disaster Recovery

• Maintain data backup protocols

• Ensure company data is backed up and recoverable

• Periodically test restoration procedures

• Maintain documentation of disaster recovery plans



Equipment & Device Management

• Maintain inventory of all company laptops and technology equipment

• Register and track device updates and warranties

• Order equipment as needed for new employees

• Manage onboarding and offboarding technology setup

• Support remote employees with device troubleshooting



Technical Support

• Provide troubleshooting support for employees experiencing technical issues

• Assist staff with system setup and best practices

• Maintain documentation and guides for internal systems



Vendor & License Management

• Track software licenses and seat utilization

• Manage renewals and vendor relationships

• Monitor software costs and identify opportunities to reduce expenses

• Negotiate pricing when appropriate



Workflow Optimization & Automation

• Identify opportunities to improve workflows across systems

• Recommend and implement integrations or automation tools where appropriate

• Maintain efficient system architecture as the company grows



Data & Research Support

Support internal research and analytics projects by:

• Assisting with survey administration and online data collection

• Organizing incoming data

• Performing data entry and data cleaning when needed

• Supporting research teams with tools such as SPSS or survey platforms



File & Digital Systems Organization

• Maintain a clear and structured company file system

• Ensure files are organized, accessible, and properly labeled

• Manage access permissions across shared drives

• Periodically review and improve file structures



Documentation & Training

• Maintain documentation of all company systems and workflows

• Stay informed about new tools and best practices

• Conduct occasional internal trainings to help staff use systems effectively

Website Management (Squarespace)

• Maintain and update the company website using the Squarespace CMS

• Publish new content including pages, blog posts, team updates, and announcements

• Implement basic site configuration and layout adjustments as needed

• Ensure website functionality, forms, and integrations remain operational

• Coordinate updates to images, copy, and page structure based on internal requests

• Monitor site performance and identify opportunities for improvement

• Maintain organized backups of website content and assets

• Perform routine maintenance and updates to ensure the website remains secure and up to date



Required Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, IT, or related field

• 5+ years experience managing SaaS systems and cloud tools

• Strong experience with Google Workspace administration

• Experience managing multiple SaaS platforms in a business environment

• Experience with user access management and permissions

• Strong understanding of cybersecurity best practices

• Excellent troubleshooting and problem-solving skills

• Strong written and spoken English communication

• Experience supporting remote teams



Preferred (Nice to Have)

• Experience managing systems for a service-based business or agency

• Experience with Asana administration

• Experience with data management or research tools (SPSS, surveys, analytics)

• Experience implementing automation or integrations

• Experience managing distributed or international teams



Work Structure

• Remote (Philippines-based)

• Full-time, long-term role

• Must overlap at least 4 hours daily with U.S. Pacific Time

• Stable internet connection required

title: ???? Supply Chain & Supplier Operations Coordinator – E-commerce
description:
???? Supply Chain & Supplier Operations Coordinator – E-commerce



Location: Remote 

Type: Full-time

Department: Operations & Supply Chain



About the Role



We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Supply Chain & Supplier Operations Coordinator to join our growing e-commerce team. In this role, you will be the operational backbone of our supply chain  ensuring our product catalogue stays accurate, our suppliers stay aligned, and our customers stay informed.



You will work closely with suppliers, internal teams, and our e-commerce platform (Shopify) to keep daily operations running smoothly. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, love structure, and take pride in keeping things organised and transparent, this role is for you.



What You'll Do



Supplier Management

- Monitor and handle supplier inquiries on a daily basis, including out-of-stock items, factory delays, and shipping disruptions

- Coordinate on product variants such as sizes, colors, sizing and alternative products to ensure continuous availability and change when needed.



Documentation & Operational Logging

- Record every inquiry and action taken in detailed log sheets

- Use logs for issue tracking, data analysis, and maintaining accurate operational records



Inventory & Product Updates

- Keep Shopify up to date with the latest stock availability, color and size variants, and product descriptions

- Ensure all Shopify updates are logged for full traceability and record-keeping



Quality Check & Stock Validation

- Perform secondary quality checks on out-of-stock items and best selling items by reviewing sales performance

- Evaluate whether to restock with existing suppliers or source alternative factories to prevent prolonged availability issues



Customer Communication Coordination

- Coordinate with the customer service team to ensure customers are promptly and transparently informed about stock availability, delays, or restock timelines

- Treat customer communication as a top priority to maintain trust and satisfaction with the customer service team



What We're Looking For

- Experience in supply chain, operations, or e-commerce coordination

- Strong organizational skills with a structured, process-driven mindset

- Hands-on experience with Shopify or similar e-commerce platforms is a plus

- Excellent communication skills both written and verbal in english

- Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and manage multiple supplier relationships simultaneously

- A proactive attitude: you spot issues before they become problems



What We Offer



- A dynamic role within a fast-growing e-commerce brand

- Remote-friendly working environment

- Room to grow and take ownership of processes

- A collaborative, results-driven team culture

- A well payed salary, starting from 300$ + monthly performance based bonus



Ready to keep our supply chain running like clockwork? Apply now and become a key part of our operations team.

description:
Job Description:

We are looking for an experienced product sourcing agent based in the Philippines to help us identify and work with manufacturers producing furniture and home decor items made from natural materials.



Our company sells coastal-style furniture and home decor in the United States, and we are interested in sourcing products made from materials such as rattan, wicker, bamboo, capiz shell, abaca, and other organic materials.



The ideal candidate should have experience working with furniture manufacturers, artisans, and factories in the Philippines.



Responsibilities:



Identify reliable manufacturers and artisans



Help arrange factory visits and meetings



Assist with product sourcing and supplier negotiations



Perform quality control and product inspections



Coordinate samples and purchasing



Communicate with suppliers on our behalf



What we are looking for:



Based in the Philippines (Cebu preferred)



Experience sourcing furniture or home decor



Strong communication skills in English



Knowledge of local manufacturers and artisan workshops

title: Senior Executive Assistant
description:
Senior Executive Assistant 

Part-Time | 9am-1pm GMT (U.K. time)

Salary:  GBP 600 per month



OVERVIEW

We are seeking an experienced Executive Assistant to provide high-level operational, administrative, and marketing support as the Founder's training and consultancy business continues to grow. The role is designed for a highly capable assistant who can take ownership of day-to-day operations, streamline workflows, and help manage long sales cycles, complex client deliverables, and a growing pipeline of opportunities.



The ideal candidate is proactive, organised, commercially aware, and comfortable supporting a founder who works across virtual training delivery, in-person sessions, business development, and long-term consulting engagements.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

-Executive Support & Operations

-Manage the Founder and Consultant’s travel and accommodation where necessary.

-Coordinate virtual and in-person training sessions, ensuring the Founder is fully prepared for each delivery block (some lasting up to 14 weeks).

-Work directly with the Founder to identify the key areas in his business that are taking his time, and build and execute a plan to take them over, freeing up the Founder to focus on solving client problems.



-Maintain oversight of ongoing client deliverables, follow-ups, and deadlines.

-Prepare documents, presentations, proposals, and reports as required.

-Keep the Founder organised, focused, and operating efficiently during heavy workload periods



Business Development Support

-Track long sales cycles (12-18 months) and maintain an organised pipeline. (don’t think this is required currently, though this could change)

-Assist in preparing bids, proposals, and supporting documentation. (yes for sure)

-Support research into new revenue streams, sectors, and partnership opportunities. (yes, I’d be interested to hear ideas from candidates into how they might approach this)



Marketing & Systems Support

-Assist with marketing administration ahead of the new website launch.

-Organise and utilise the Founder’s extensive internal data to support marketing campaigns.

-Support creation and coordination of
 marketing campaigns and newsletters.

-Help build and maintain operational systems, SOPs, and workflow processes.

-Coordinate tasks with external marketing or web development partners where needed.



Client & Project Support

-Communicate with clients around schedules, follow-ups, and document needs.

-Help ensure high-quality service delivery by managing logistics, timelines, and expectations.

-Support onboarding and coordination of contractors, part-time workers, or partners.

-Prepare reports based on evaluation form feedback from course deliveries.

-Prepare and complete vendor forms for customer onboarding.

-Helping with hosting and monitoring of Zoom events where required (with adequate notice given).

-Pre-course information gathering (including assisting with systematizing process)



ROLE REQUIREMENTS

-At least 5 years of experience as an Executive Assistant or Operations Assistant.

-Experience supporting founders, consultants, or senior executives.

-Strong organisational skills with the ability to manage multiple competing priorities.

-Excellent written and spoken English.

-Highly proactive, able to anticipate needs and solve problems independently

-Experience in B2B or professional services marketing is highly desirable.

-Comfortable supporting a business with fluctuating timelines, tight deadlines, and periods of intense delivery.



PERSONAL ATTRIBUTES

-Calm, composed, and able to support an executive under pressure.

-Detail-oriented with strong follow-through.

-Commercially minded and able to understand business priorities quickly

-Structured, systematic, and process-driven.

-Loyal, trustworthy, and able to handle confidential information responsibly.



SUCCESS INDICATORS

-The Founder’s calendar, inbox, and workload become structured and manageable. (My inbox is pretty manageable, and calendar is manageable also - at least for now)

-Sales pipeline and client follow-ups are consistently maintained. (not a priority more what I should focus on)

-Administrative and operational bottlenecks are removed. (yes)

-Liaising with consultants to provide some support for engagements. A systemised way of managing multiple diaries would be useful.



Administration relating to onboarding, admin for organising courses, new clients etc.

Documentation for marketing and proposals. This is a time consuming part of the process, and I would like someone who can help to standardise this in a way that makes it a great deal easier.

Marketing activity (particularly
 marketing and campaigns) becomes consistent. This is a priority; The Founderd needs someone to help build a marketing machine and help manage the workflow for this, and to rationalise all of the data we have.



OTHERS

Making posts on Linkedin via the company account, other similar marketing related activities.

Systems and processes are in place to reduce overwhelm and support growth.

This is important, someone who can help drive initiatives to grow the business.



The Founder gains back significant time each week, allowing him to focus on growth, consulting, and client delivery.



**HOW TO APPLY:  Please fill out this form:  
 

Please apply ONLY if you are 100% confident you are qualified.

title: High-Level GRC Analyst (SME) – Interview Proxy Specialist
description:
Job Description: We are seeking a top-tier GRC (Governance, Risk, and Compliance) Expert with impeccable English and senior-level technical knowledge. This is a unique, high-stakes role where you will act as a technical consultant and proxy for live interviews for real job applications in the USA.



You aren't just an analyst; you are a professional communicator who can navigate complex technical assessments and represent the technical expertise required for premium GRC roles.



Responsibilities:



Participate in live, technical video interviews for GRC Analyst positions.



Demonstrate absolute mastery over NIST, ISO 27001, SOC2, HIPAA, and AI Risk Frameworks.



Provide clear, authoritative, senior-level responses to complex risk and compliance scenarios on the fly.



Work closely with our technical team to ensure a seamless presentation.



Compensation & Success Structure:



Trial/Prep Fee: $10 USD per interview session.



???? HUGE Success Bonus: $600 USD (Approx. ?34,500) paid immediately for every interview you pass that leads to a job offer.



Note: We are targeting 2 successes in the first month, meaning a potential $1,200 USD in bonuses alone.



After interviews are done no more interviews will be conducted. 



Ongoing Salary: $400 USD/month once the project roles are stable. with Evaluation for raise after month 1 , 6th and 12th.



Government Benefits: PhilHealth, SSS, and Pag-IBIG.



13th Month Pay: Full statutory extra month of salary in December.



Requirements:



Perfect English: You must have a neutral or professional corporate accent suitable for US-based stakeholders.



Deep Experience: A proven track record in Risk Assessments, Gap Analysis, and IT Auditing.



Expertise: Mastery of GRC frameworks (NIST, ISO, SOC2).



Availability: Must be available for flexible hours to attend interviews in US Time Zones.



How to Apply:

To be considered, you MUST follow these steps:



Start your application with the word "GRC".



You must have apply with a minimum of 2 Application Points 



Attach a brief summary of your GRC experience.



Provide a 30-second voice recording (English) demonstrating your professional speaking tone.



Skills Requirement:



GRC (Governance, Risk, and Compliance)



NIST / ISO 27001 Expertise



Expert Verbal English

title: Hospitality Operations Manager - Remote (Short-Term Rental & Wedding Venue)
description:
About the Role

We run a US-based luxury hospitality portfolio — currently 3–6 short-term rental properties and a boutique micro-wedding venue. We're looking for an Operations Manager, not a Virtual Assistant.

We run a modern, tech-forward operation — we use a lot of tools, build custom systems, and lean on AI to work smarter. You don't need to be an engineer, but you do need to be the kind of person who picks up new software quickly and genuinely enjoys finding better ways to do things.

This role is the "Control Tower" of our business. You will own logistics, guest experience, wedding sales, and brand marketing simultaneously — solving problems, spending company money when needed, and making judgment calls without waiting on the owner. If you need to be told what to do every hour, this is not the right fit. If you thrive with real ownership and a direct line to leadership, keep reading.



What You'll Own

1. Logistics & Procurement

You are responsible for ensuring our properties never run out of supplies. You'll manage inventory across all locations, use the company card to reorder linens, toiletries, and consumables proactively, and maintain accurate stock logs. You own this — not us.

Cleaner & Contractor Oversight: You are the direct supervisor for our cleaning teams. You'll set schedules, review photo quality reports after each turnover, and approve payments. If something breaks — a heater, a lock, an appliance — you troubleshoot with the guest, source and hire a local contractor, authorize payment, and then notify the owner once it's resolved.

2. Wedding Venue Sales & Coordination

Our systems are set up to help you respond to inbound wedding inquiries within 5 minutes during your shift — and that standard is non-negotiable. You'll answer questions about pricing, capacity, and availability with a warm, white-glove tone that matches the caliber of our venue. You'll qualify leads, schedule on-site tours, and keep our CRM (HoneyBook/Dubsado) clean and up to date so no lead falls through the cracks.

3. Guest Experience — Short-Term Rentals

Own all guest communication from inquiry to checkout across Airbnb and VRBO. Handle escalations, disputes with platform support, and craft professional responses to reviews — both positive and negative.

4. Content & Marketing 

This is a real part of the job, not an afterthought. You'll be responsible for:

- Social media posting and scheduling across Instagram,
, and TikTok using our content calendar and tools (e.g., Later, Buffer, or similar)

- Marketing
 execution — sending pre-written or lightly templated campaigns to our lead lists via our
 platform (e.g., Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or similar)

- Keeping our pipeline warm — following up with cold leads, past inquirers, and potential repeat guests using pre-approved messaging



You won't be writing strategy from scratch, but you need strong written English and an eye for what looks and sounds premium.



Requirements:



- 3+ years of experience in operations, property management, event coordination, or a hybrid hospitality/marketing role

- Must be available to work full-time, Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (US Central Time) — this is a hard requirement, no  exceptions

- Prior experience handling company expenses, purchasing, or petty cash — you will be trusted with a company card

- Fluent English communication, both written and spoken — you will be on calls with guests, wedding couples, and vendors regularly and must be able to represent the brand with confidence and warmth

- Solid working knowledge of Google Drive, Sheets, and Docs as a daily operating environment

- Comfortable with a tools-heavy workflow — you'll use multiple platforms simultaneously and are expected to learn new software quickly, including tools that are custom-built for our operation

- At least passing familiarity with Slack, a CRM platform (HoneyBook, Dubsado, or similar), a social media scheduling tool (Later, Buffer, or similar), and Airbnb/VRBO host dashboards

- Open to using AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude as part of your day-to-day — we'll show you how we use them, but curiosity beats credentials here

- High emotional intelligence — you can de-escalate a frustrated guest and keep an anxious bride feeling taken care of, all in the same afternoon

- Strong written English with a warm, professional tone that reflects a premium brand

Platform experience with Ownerrez is a strong plus but not required — we'll train the right person



Hardware Requirements: Reliable PC or Mac, 25 Mbps+ internet connection, Noise-canceling headset (required for guest and vendor calls)



Why This Role

Our last ops hire treated this like a task queue. We need someone who treats it like a business they co-own. As we add properties — and we are actively acquiring — your scope and compensation grow with us. This is a long-term career position with a direct relationship with the owner, not a seat in a call center.



How to Apply

Applications that don't follow these instructions will not be reviewed — this is your first test of attention to detail.

Send an
 with the subject line: Hospitality Ops Manager – [Your Name]

Include:

1. Your resume or portfolio link.

2. Written answers to both scenarios below:

Scenario A — The Inventory Problem: You review a cleaner's post-checkout report and notice one of our properties has 2 rolls of toilet paper left. A guest checks in tomorrow. Next-day delivery isn't available and the owner is unreachable. What do you do, step by step?

Scenario B — The Wedding Inquiry: A bride
s asking to tour the venue this Saturday at 2 PM. Your calendar shows a private event in progress at that time. Write the actual reply you'd send her — it must decline that slot while keeping her warm and moving toward a booking.

title: Construction Accounting & Financial Operations Manager
description:
The Construction Accounting & Financial Operations Manager will be responsible for building and managing the internal financial systems for ARM Construction Group LLC.



This role will oversee accounting organization, financial reporting, project cost tracking, and financial coordination with the company’s local CPA in the United States.



The objective of this position is to establish strong financial organization, maintain accurate records, improve cost tracking on projects, and support the company’s growth.



The candidate must be proactive, detail-oriented, highly organized, and capable of building accounting systems from the ground up.



Core Responsibilities



Work Schedule / Time Zone Requirement



The position must work during hours that align with the company’s operations in El Paso, Texas (Mountain Time) and coordinate directly with the company owner and tea
mbers.



Standard working hours will be:



Philippines Time:

5:00 PM – 1:00 AM (Philippines Standard Time)



This schedule ensures daily overlap with the management team in the United States and allows real-time coordination on financial reporting, project cost tracking, invoices, and operational decisions.



Flexibility may occasionally be required during busy project periods or financial reporting deadlines.



Financial Management



• Maintain and organize all company financial records

• Record and categorize transactions

• Reconcile bank accounts and credit cards

• Track income, expenses, and project profitability

• Maintain accurate accounting ledgers



Project Cost Tracking



• Track costs for each construction project

• Monitor labor, material, subcontractor, and equipment expenses

• Compare estimated vs actual project costs

• Prepare project profitability reports



Invoicing & Payments



• Prepare and send invoices to clients

• Track payments received

• Follow up on outstanding invoices

• Prepare payments for suppliers and subcontractors

• Maintain accounts receivable and accounts payable



Financial Reporting



• Prepare monthly financial reports including:



Profit & Loss statements



Project financial summaries



Cash flow reports



• Prepare quarterly reports for the company’s local CPA in the United States



Administrative Financial Systems



• Develop and maintain financial spreadsheets and reporting systems

• Maintain organized digital financial records

• Assist with budgeting and financial planning



Coordination With Management



• Work directly with the company owner to improve financial organization

• Support decision making with financial data and reports

• Help identify opportunities to improve profitability and efficiency



Skills & Experience Preferred



• Accounting or finance Degree

• Experience with construction accounting preferred

• Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills

• Experience with accounting software (QuickBooks preferred)

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to organize financial systems from scratch

• Excellent communication skills



IMPORTANT MUST READ, WRITE, and UNDERSTAND ENGLISH 



Key Traits We Are Looking For



• Highly organized

• Proactive problem solver

• Reliable and trustworthy

• Able to work independently

• Detail oriented

• Long-term mindset



Goal of the Position



To build a strong financial foundation for ARM Construction Group and support the company’s growth by maintaining organized, accurate, and transparent financial systems.

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
ABOUT US



Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 5:00am–2:00pm PST
