title: Supply Chain Director - Full time
description:
About Stay Golden HI



Stay Golden HI is a Hawaii-based jewelry brand inspired by the warmth of the islands, the richness of Chinese culture, and the power of self-expression. The company creates water-safe, tarnish-resistant pieces—especially charm earrings, layering staples, and bold statement designs—crafted to be mixed, matched, and styled your way.



Description



1. Inventory & Demand Planning

You will own end-to-end inventory visibility for Stay Golden Hawaii’s fast-moving, high-SKU catalog.

This includes:

• Building demand forecasts around weekly drops, Meta Ads scale, and seasonality

• Setting and monitoring stock level targets to avoid sell-outs and overstock

• Translating marketing / launch calendars into clear purchasing and production plans

You are responsible for ensuring the right product, in the right quantities, is available before we turn on spend.



2. Purchasing, Production & Vendor Management

You will run the full purchasing and production loop so launches are on time and fully stocked.

This includes:

• Placing and tracking POs, managing lead times, and aligning timelines with weekly drops

• Owning relationships with suppliers, manufacturers, and logistics partners

• Proactively resolving delays, quality issues, and cost overruns before they hit customers

You should be relentless about on-time, in-full delivery and constantly improving reliability.



3. Operations Systems & Tooling

You will build and maintain the systems that keep our DTC operation running smoothly.

This includes:

• Owning our Shopify, ERP, Airtable, Notion, PLM and Slack workflows for operations

• Designing clean processes for SKU creation, drops, replenishment, and handoffs to 3PL/fulfillment

• Creating dashboards and reports that give the founder and media buyer real-time clarity on stock

You’re expected to spot operational gaps and fix them without being asked.



4. Leadership, Collaboration & Performance

You will lead the ops/supply chain team and be a key partner to growth.

This includes:

• Managing and developing the operations team to be autonomous, proactive problem-solvers

• Working closely with the founder and media buying team so supply can keep up with winning ads

• Owning supply-side inputs to growth targets (1.5x ROAS and 30+ conversions) by never letting inventory be the bottleneck

Success means supply chain is “set it and forget it” for the founder, even as weekly drops and SKU count continue to scale.



You are:

• An experienced supply chain operator (3–5+ years) who’s scaled DTC ecom, ideally with apparel, accessories, or fast-moving consumer products

• Deeply comfortable owning inventory planning, purchasing, logistics, and 3PL/warehouse relationships end-to-end

• Excited by a bold, fashion-forward brand designed in Hawaii, with a strong instinct for balancing stock levels with fast-moving “it” products

How you work:

• Proactive, resourceful, and hungry to learn— you take full ownership, flag issues early, and solve problems before they hit the founder’s radar

• Highly organized and systems-minded, confident in building/optimizing processes across Slack, Airtable, Notion, Shopify, and an ERP



Bonus:

• Experience managing supply chains for online-first fashion or accessories brands serving Gen Z / chronically-online customers

• Background in demand forecasting for paid-social-driven brands (especially Meta Ads) and coordinating with media buyers to avoid stockouts

• Familiarity with international shipping, customs, and 3PLs, especially for brands based in or shipping from Hawaii



How to apply



Message me "assessment" to get next steps

title: Financial Controller- CPA (Remote – Philippines)
description:
We are an Australian-based multi-business platform operating across aviation assets, finance and treasury, commercial real estate and digital assets.



As the organisation continues to grow, we are seeking a disciplined Financial Controller to take ownership of the company’s financial records and reporting systems across the group.



This role is the company’s in-house group accountant, responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, reliable reporting and clear financial visibility across all entities. You will help ensure leadership always has a clear and accurate understanding of the group’s financial position, liquidity and obligations.

This is a hands-on accounting role, not a consulting or advisory position.



You will work directly inside the company’s financial systems — maintaining records, preparing reports and ensuring financial information remains accurate, organised and up to date. You will work closely with the Treasurer and leadership team to ensure the financial position of the organisation can be clearly understood at any time.



What You Will Do

Maintain Financial Records

Maintain accurate financial records across all group entities including accounts payable, accounts receivable and reconciliations.

Operate Accounting Systems

Maintain the company’s accounting systems and ensure financial records remain current, organised and reliable.

Prepare Financial Reporting

Prepare structured financial reports and management summaries that provide clear visibility of financial performance and liquidity.

Maintain Cashflow Visibility

Prepare rolling cashflow forecasts and maintain visibility of liquidity across the group.

Track Financial Obligations

Monitor debt obligations, repayment schedules and financial commitments across entities.

Support Financial Oversight

Maintain financial models used to evaluate investments and projects under the direction of the Treasurer.

Maintain Financial Controls

Ensure financial policies, procedures and internal controls are consistently followed across the organisation.

Coordinate Financial Information

Ensure financial information required for management reviews is prepared and available when needed.



What This Role Does NOT Include

No client accounting work

 No external consulting

 No multi-client accounting practice work

 No freelance or part-time arrangements

 No sales, marketing or business development

This role is focused purely on maintaining financial systems and financial visibility for the group.



About You

To succeed in this role you will ideally have the following:

CPA qualification (or equivalent professional accounting certification)

Minimum 5 years experience in accounting, bookkeeping or financial control roles

Strong attention to detail and accuracy in financial records and reporting

Experience maintaining organised accounting systems and financial records

Experience working with accounting platforms such as Xero

Comfortable maintaining financial records across multiple entities

Able to work methodically and consistently with minimal supervision

Strong written communication and the ability to present financial information clearly

Comfortable working independently while maintaining clear communication with leadership



Desirable

Experience with Australian accounting environments

Exposure to commercial real estate accounting

Experience working with multi-entity company structures



Work Setup

This is a full-time remote role (40+ hours per week).

You will work Philippines business hours.

This role requires your full professional commitment.

This is your one full-time job — we are not hiring applicants who are working other jobs, freelancing or managing side clients.



Growth Path

This role begins with responsibility for maintaining the company’s financial records and reporting systems.

Over time, the right person may take on broader financial oversight responsibilities and become more closely involved in the organisation’s financial planning and reporting processes.

Tea
mbers who demonstrate reliability, discipline and consistency are given increasing responsibility as the organisation grows.



How to Apply

To apply,
 us with the subject line:

“I am your Financial Controller”

In your
 please include:

A short explanation of your relevant operations experience and why this role fits you

Your expected monthly salary (in PHP)

Confirmation that you are available for full-time employment (40+ hours per week) with an understanding this will be your one and only full time job

Your computer specifications and internet speed

Your resume and a link to your OnlineJobs profile

Your DISC assessment results (if available)

Applications close 5pm Manila time 20 March 2026

title: Accountant (WFO - Pasig, Metro Manilla)
description:
About AlgoGroup



AlgoGroup operates a pet healthcare + e-commerce platform across Hong Kong and Asia. We run a fast-moving operation with tight cash discipline. We’re building internal workflows (procurement + approvals) and need a strong finance executor to keep the daily finance heartbeat accurate and on time. We have build a founding team in the Phillipines and are eagerly expanding our team with passionate individuals with a desire to be part of a start-up with global ambition.



What You’ll Own (Your Mission)



You will be the daily cash truth owner and payables/bookkeeping executor. Your job is to make sure:

- we always know cash position + what’s due

- payables are tracked properly

- QuickBooks stays accurate

- bank reconciliation is clean

- reporting outputs go out on time, every time

- you use AI/automation to reduce manual work and improve speed/accuracy



Responsibilities



Daily

- Update cash position (by a set time, e.g., 11:00am HK time)

- Maintain AP tracker (what’s due in 7/14/30 days, by entity + vendor)

- Prepare payment batches for approval (you do not approve payments)

- Post transactions into QuickBooks Online

- Organize invoices/receipts and maintain clean documentation



Weekly



- Bank reconciliation (all relevant accounts)

- Inputs to weekly finance pack (cash, AP due, key variances)

- Vendor statement checks + resolve discrepancies

- Support ops team with clean invoice coding / expense categorization



Monthly

- Support month-end close: ensure recs are complete and books are current



Tools & Skills Required

- QuickBooks Online

- Bank reconciliation experience (must have)

- Financial reporting basics (weekly cash/AP reporting)

- AI/automation mindset: you regularly use tools like ChatGPT, templates, automation, spreadsheets, checklists to improve accuracy and speed (share examples)

- Google Sheets



Experience Requirements

- 5–8 years experience in bookkeeping / AP / reconciliation

- E-commerce experience (Shopify / marketplaces / online orders) is strongly preferred

- Startup / fast-paced SME experience preferred

- Strong English written communication; Ability to use ChatGPT for translations in other languages



How to Apply - Please include:

- CV

- A short Loom video (3–5 mins): your QBO experience + reconciliation experience + how you use AI/automation

Answers:

- What time range can you work (HK time)?

- Describe the last bank reconciliation you handled (how many accounts, frequency).

- Describe your e-commerce accounting experience.

title: Amazon PPC Manager
description:
Urgent Hiring: Amazon PPC Manager

Reports To: CEO / Amazon Optimization Manager

Work Hours: Philippines Daytime Work Hours



Company Vision

We want to work with you to grow our company while helping you to become a superstar in your field. We value problem solvers, go-getters, and people with opinions who want to make an impact. You will be on the leading edge of Amazon and online strategies, continually improving your knowledge in the pursuit of helping us grow our business.



At the same time, you will be working with a company that values community & family—both internally and customer-facing. Our mission is to delight kids & parents with creative craft kits and related products. We are 100% focused on that mission and want you to be there on the ride with us!



That’s where you come in as our next Amazon PPC Manager.



Role Purpose

The Amazon PPC Manager owns the performance of all paid advertising on Amazon across our catalog. This person leads the strategy, execution, and optimization of all Sponsored Product, Sponsored Brand, and Sponsored Display campaigns to drive discoverability, revenue growth, and profitable scaling.



You will leverage Scale Insights daily—using advanced features like automation flows, keyword scoring, search term mining, and campaign-level rule logic—to drive high-impact decisions. Your ability to move beyond manual optimization and harness automation for scale is critical to success in this role.



What Success Looks Like

You consistently drive performance improvements using both manual and automated techniques, with Scale Insights as your core control panel. You own automation flows that intelligently adjust bids, pause underperforming targets, surface search term goldmines, and scale winners. You don’t just use Scale Insights—you master it.



You maintain a proactive and adaptive PPC strategy aligned with the catalog lifecycle, launch timing, and seasonality. Through frequent reporting, experimentation, and coordination with SEO, creative, and ops, you ensure campaigns support profitable, long-term growth.



Primary Objectives

Maximize profitable growth through advanced automation using Scale Insights

Own and optimize campaign architecture to drive ROI across all product stages

Partner cross-functionally for ad-aligned launches, creatives, and keyword strategy

Test, measure, and iterate to continuously improve CTR, CVR, and ROAS



Regular Work Activities

Monitor and refine SP/SB/SD campaigns daily through Scale Insights dashboards

Execute bid adjustments, search term mining, negative pruning

Build and optimize automation rules and flows in Scale Insights

Audit underperforming ad groups and apply automated corrective logic

Set up rule-based triggers for seasonal budget shifts and event-based bidding

Conduct A/B testing for headlines, images, placements

Weekly reporting with commentary using Scale Insights and custom dashboards

Work with SEO to align ad keyword targeting with organic ranking efforts

Collaborate with creative to ensure ad assets match campaign goals

Track budget utilization and reallocate funds based on real-time data

Maintain documentation and SOPs for all Scale Insights workflows

Guide PPC Assistants on implementing and QA’ing automation rules

Troubleshoot disapproved or underperforming ads

Flag inventory and pricing concerns affecting campaign viability

Maintain performance calendars for launches, promos, seasonality



Key Skills

title: Upwork & Fiverr Account Manager VA
description:
Business Development Manager – Full-Time (Remote)



We're a growing digital marketing and Shopify development agency looking for a full-time Business Development Manager to own and grow our presence on Upwork and Fiverr. This is a high-ownership role with real impact — you'll be responsible for bringing in new clients through our agency accounts on both platforms.



The Role

You'll be the driving force behind our freelance platform growth — finding and applying to new opportunities, building out our service listings, writing proposals that win, and creating content that keeps our profiles competitive. You'll have access to paid automation software to support your workflow.



Daily Responsibilities

Upwork



Monitor for new job opportunities daily using our paid automation software

Write tailored, high-converting proposals (leveraging AI tools)

Optimise our agency profile for visibility and conversion

Track proposal performance and continuously refine messaging



Fiverr



Create new gig listings including titles, descriptions, FAQs, and pricing tiers

Apply SEO and keyword strategies to maximise discoverability

Manage and refresh existing gigs to maintain ranking and relevance

Research competitor gigs and adapt our strategy accordingly



Content



Produce content for our freelance profiles (portfolio updates, service highlights)

Create content for our social media platforms

Use AI tools to scale output while maintaining quality and brand voice





What We're Looking For

Must-have:



Solid hands-on experience with both Upwork and Fiverr — you understand how each platform works, what drives rankings, and how to write proposals that convert

Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) for proposals, listings, and content creation

Strong written English — sharp, persuasive, and error-free

Self-starter who takes ownership and hits daily targets without micromanagement



Nice to have:



Background in digital marketing, ecommerce, or Shopify-related services

Experience managing agency accounts (not just individual freelancer profiles)

Social media content creation experience for service businesses





What We Offer



Full-time remote role with a stable, growing agency

Paid automation tools provided at no cost to you

Performance incentives tied to client acquisition results

Direct access to leadership — your strategic input is valued

Room to grow as we scale





How to Apply

Please include the following with your application:



A brief intro — who you are and why this role is a fit

Your specific experience with Upwork and/or Fiverr (platforms used, services sold, results achieved)

A sample proposal or gig description you've written, or a comparable writing sample

How you currently use AI tools in your day-to-day work



Applications without relevant experience on both platforms will not be considered. If you know these platforms well and want to own a real growth function, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Short-Form Video Editor
description:
Hi! We’re Shoutout Digital, an Australia-based digital marketing agency that works with dental clinics and service businesses across the country.



This time, we’re on the lookout for a Short-Form Video Editor to help us create scroll-stopping social media videos. You’ll be working with a mix of raw video content, B-rolls, client-submitted footage, and other assets to produce short-form videos optimised for platforms like Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok.



These aren’t heavy long-form edits, just fast, creative, punchy videos that get attention and get results.



What You’ll Be Doing

 • Familiarity with platform trends (especially Meta & TikTok)

 • Comfortable working with raw B-roll and turning it into polished output

 • Able to receive feedback and iterate with ease

 • Good file management and timely handovers



Work Hours & Setup



 • This is a full-time role with a typical workload of around 30 to 40 hours per week. It may occasionally extend depending on what’s needed.

 • Work is only from Monday to Friday, so no weekend work is required.

 • You’ll have control over your schedule. We just ask that you’re mindful of our business hours (10 AM to 5 PM PHT) in case we need to touch base or align on anything.



Perks You’ll Enjoy



 • Paid leaves (yep, we want you to rest too)

 • All-expense paid team dinners and team buildings



How to Apply

https://tally.so/r/LZP2aO



We’ll review your answers and reach out if shortlisted. Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Senior Accountant (FP&A / Reporting) - WFO Pasig Metro Manilla
description:
About AlgoGroup



AlgoGroup operates a pet healthcare + e-commerce platform across Hong Kong and Asia. We’re a fast-moving operator with tight cash discipline. Finance here is not “back office.” It’s a decision engine: cashflow, profitability, inventory discipline, and growth insights. This is a senior hire: we value people who can say - ‘here’s what changed, here’s why, and here’s what we should do next.’ If you prefer a role where you only post numbers and stay silent, this won’t fit.



If you enjoy being close to the business, building systems, and surfacing insights—not just closing books—this role will fit.



What Success Looks Like



Within 30–60 days, you can:

- Produce a weekly pack that leadership can act on immediately (not just raw numbers)

- Explain what changed, why it changed, and what to do about it

- Build simple dashboards and processes that reduce manual work

- Run month-end close with a clear checklist and clean reconciliations



Your Mission



You will own the weekly finance operating pack and help build a repeatable finance system:

- full-set accounting discipline (accurate books)

- FP&A-style analysis (variance, runway, unit economics, early warnings)

- reporting that creates decisions (not reports that sit unread)

- SOPs + automation so outputs don’t rely on heroics



Key Responsibilities

1) Weekly Finance Operating Pack (Decision-Grade)

- Produce a weekly pack covering: cash position, burn/runway trend, AP/AR aging, key expense movements, and business drivers

- Provide variance commentary (what moved, why, what action is needed, and owner)

- Flag risks early (e.g., runway compression, unusual spend, margin deterioration) with clear explanation and recommended actions



2) FP&A + Business Insights (Practical, not academic)

- Build and maintain a simple rolling cash forecast (e.g., 13-week view)

- Track key KPIs (gross margin, contribution margin, key cost buckets, marketing efficiency where relevant)

- Identify and quantify improvement levers (working capital, vendor terms, cost control, pricing/discount effects)



3) Full-Set Accounting + Close

- Own or co-own month-end close timeline and checklist

- Ensure reconciliations are completed consistently (bank, key balance sheet accounts)

- Maintain clean audit trail and documentation discipline



4) Systems, Dashboards, Automation

- Standardize chart of accounts, vendor coding, entity mapping

- Build dashboards and reporting views in Power BI and/or advanced Google Sheets (Looker Studio acceptable)

- Use AI/automation to reduce manual effort (examples: templated variance commentary, automated data pulls/cleanups, structured close checklists, reconciliations support)



Tools You’ll Use

- QuickBooks Online (must have)

- Google Sheets (packs, mapping, trackers)

- Power BI / Looker Studio (preferred)

- Drive/Slack/WhatsApp for coordination



Requirements (Must Have)

- 8–12+ years experience in accounting/finance (SME / multi-entity preferred)

- Full-set accounting capability (journal entries, reconciliations, close)

- Strong QuickBooks Online experience

- Comfortable building packs and explaining variances clearly (written + verbal)

- Strong ownership mindset: you raise issues early and propose actions

- Can work from office in Pasig, Metro Manila (WFO)



Strongly Preferred

- FP&A experience (forecasting, cash runway, variance analysis)

- E-commerce / startup experience (Shopify, marketplaces, inventory businesses)

- Dashboard/reporting skills (Power BI / Sheets)

- Experience improving processes and reducing manual work



How to Apply (Important)



Please include:

1. CV

2. A Loom video (4–6 mins) answering:

- Describe a weekly pack you built and what insights/actions it drove

- Describe a 13-week cash forecast you’ve managed (or similar)

- Show one dashboard/report you built (Power BI / Sheets)

- Share 1–2 examples of how you use AI/automation to work faster/cleaner

3. Answer:

- How many entities have you managed in one role?

- What’s your strongest “insight” example (a time you flagged a risk early and what happened)?

title: Remote Virtual Assistant (Operations Coordinator)
description:
Plumbing Bros National Assist – Australia

Remote Virtual Assistant (Operations Coordinator)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Work Schedule: Monday – Friday | 6:00 AM – 3:00 PM or 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PHT (rostered)



About Plumbing Bros



Plumbing Bros is one of Australia’s fastest-growing plumbing networks and is recognised for delivering reliable service, professional workmanship, and exceptional customer experiences.



Our mission is to change the perception of plumbing by raising the standard of service in the industry. We believe great tradespeople are also great customer service professionals, and we approach every job with that mindset.



Our continued national growth has created an opportunity to join Plumbing Bros National Assist, our operations support team based in Perth, Australia. We are looking for a talented tea
mber to work remotely from the Philippines and support our operational systems and coordination.



About the Role



Plumbing Bros National Assist supports plumbing operations across Australia. We are seeking a Remote Virtual Assistant (VA) – Operations Coordinator to assist with the daily coordination and administration of jobs within our job management system.



This is a full-time remote independent contractor position based in the Philippines.



You will play a key role in ensuring jobs are accurately created, scheduled, and managed within our systems to support smooth operational execution across the network.



You will work closely with our internal operations team to:



1. Create and manage jobs in Ascora

2. Coordinate scheduling and job allocation

3. Maintain accurate job records

4. Manage shared inbox communications

5. Support operational workflows



The role also includes outbound scheduling calls and SMS communication with work order contacts, as well as occasional inbound call support during peak periods.



Success in this role requires strong attention to detail, confidence working within structured systems, and the ability to work effectively with job management software, AI tools, and semi-automated workflows.



Scheduler Capability Requirement



This role requires a highly capable and experienced scheduler who can operate effectively in a fast-paced environment. The ideal candidate must have strong scheduling or dispatch coordination experience, be extremely organised, and have the ability to work quickly while maintaining accuracy.



You must be comfortable managing multiple tasks simultaneously, coordinating schedules, updating systems in real time, and communicating clearly with customers and internal teams. Strong attention to detail, speed, and the ability to prioritise tasks efficiently are essential for success in this role.



Candidates with previous experience in scheduling, dispatch coordination, or job management systems will be strongly preferred.



Key Responsibilities



Job Creation & System Accuracy

1. Create and manage jobs within Ascora, ensuring all details align with work orders and customer notes

2. Identify missing or unclear information and resolve issues before jobs progress

3. Maintain accurate job statuses to support scheduling, invoicing, and reporting



Scheduling & Coordination

1. Conduct outbound scheduling via phone calls and SMS

2. Coordinate scheduling requirements for contractual arrangements (including ATCO Gas contracts)

3. Allocate jobs based on location, priority, contract requirements, and technician availability

4. Support automated scheduling workflows where applicable

5. Escalate scheduling conflicts early to avoid service delays



Customer Communication

1. Answer overflow inbound calls during peak periods

2. Handle customer enquiries professionally and efficiently

3. Ensure clear communication between customers, technicians, and internal teams



Inbox & Administrative Management

1. Manage the shared company inbox and ensure timely responses

2. Maintain organised follow-ups within your personal inbox

3. Assist with quote follow-ups to support conversion and customer experience

4. Maintain clear communication records within Ascora or relevant systems



Operational Support

1. Assist with ad hoc administrative and operational tasks

2. Support operations and leadership teams with coordination and process execution

3. Identify opportunities to improve workflows, templates, and automation

4. Flag recurring issues or inefficiencies and suggest improvements



About You

You may be a strong fit for this role if you are:

1. Highly organised and detail-oriented

2. Comfortable working with systems, software, and structured processes

3. Confident in communicating with English-speaking clients

4. Able to work independently while collaborating with a remote team

5. Technically capable and quick to learn new tools



Mandatory Requirements



Experience

Minimum 1–2 years of experience in an administrative, operational, or data-focused role



Software Knowledge

Experience with job management systems is highly beneficial, including:

1. Ascora

2. Xero

3. SimPRO

4. AroFlo



Experience with AI tools or automation workflows is also advantageous.



English Communication

1. Must have strong English communication skills suitable for Australian clients

2. Experience handling inbound and outbound calls is required

3. Must be confident in communicating clearly and professionally



Candidates must submit a 1-minute video or audio introduction as part of the application.



Work Setup Requirements

Candidates must have:

1. Quiet and professional home workspace

2. Dual monitor setup (2 screens required)

3. Stable high-speed internet connection with backup plan

4. High-quality headset for calls



Applicants must submit:

1. Photos of their home office and IT setup

2. Internet speed test results



Salary & Benefits

1. Competitive salary package

2. Fully remote work environment

3. Work with a fast-growing Australian company

4. Supportive and professional team environment

5. Opportunities for long-term growth and development



Application Process

To apply, please submit the following:

1. Resume

2. Cover letter

3. 1-minute video or audio introduction explaining your background and interest in the role

4. Photos and details of your IT setup and workspace

5. Screenshot of your internet speed test



Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an initial interview.



Join Plumbing Bros National Assist and become part of a team committed to professionalism, quality service, and operational excellence.

title: Video Editor for D2C E-Commerce Ads (Short-Form & UGC Creatives, VSLs)

Your main responsibility will be editing UGC-style ads and high-performing ad creatives and VSLs for platforms like TikTok, Meta 
/Instagram), and other paid acquisition channels.



This role is perfect for someone who understands performance marketing, fast-paced creative production, and wants to grow with a performance-driven company.



Your Responsibilities



Edit short-form ad creatives for D2C brands (TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads)



Produce 3–5 ad concepts per day



Work with UGC footage, product footage, and scripts



Add high-quality motion graphics, captions, hooks, and visual effects



Turn raw footage into high-converting ad creatives



Collaborate with our team to iterate and test new ad concepts



Optimize edits based on performance marketing principles



Required Skills



Strong experience editing short-form ad creatives



High-level editing speed (ability to produce multiple creatives daily)



Advanced skills in Adobe Premiere Pro



Strong knowledge of After Effects and Motion Design



Ability to create engaging hooks, dynamic captions, and visual storytelling



Understanding of performance marketing and paid ads

title: People Operations Associate
description:
BEFORE YOU APPLY: This is an entry-level execution role. Please read the qualifications carefully.



We're looking for a People Operations Associate to support our People Operations and Process Engineering initiatives. In this role, you will help ensure that people operations processes, operational workflows, and internal initiatives run smoothly and consistently.



You will work closely with leadership and cross-functional teams to manage people operations activities, lead recruitment processes, support operational improvements, and maintain visibility and accountability across tasks and initiatives. This role offers hands-on exposure across **People Operations and Process Engineering**, contributing to a structured and continuously improving operational environment.



What You’ll Do



People Operations



- Manage crew member records, onboarding documentation, and internal reports.

- Coordinate onboarding and employee lifecycle administration to ensure new hires are properly set up.

- Support coaching coordination, internal feedback loops, and crew engagement initiatives.

- Conduct or support quality reviews to ensure operational standards and processes are followed.

- Coordinate with hiring managers to assess staffing needs and move candidates through the hiring process efficiently.

- Maintain candidate records and hiring documentation to ensure accuracy and organization.



Process Engineering



- Assist in rolling out new processes, workflows, and operational tools across teams.

- Onboard crew members to new operational initiatives and track project progress to ensure deliverables remain on schedule.

- Track operational initiatives, action items, and cross-team follow-ups to maintain accountability and visibility.

- Identify workflow gaps, gather feedback on implemented processes, and surface opportunities for improvement.



Requirements



- 1–3 years of experience in HR, operations, administration, or virtual assistant roles

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

- Ability to manage multiple workflows and maintain structured documentation

- Strong communication and coordination skills

- Comfortable using Google Workspace and learning tools such as Airtable, Notion, and ChatGPT

- Demonstrates integrity, accountability, and reliability



Nice to Have



- Experience supporting process improvement or operational initiatives

- Familiarity with process documentation or SOP creation

- Experience in project coordination or task tracking is a plus

- Exposure to quality reviews or operational audits



Success in This Role Looks Like



- People Operations processes and crew records are consistently maintained and organized.

- Recruitment coordination ensures hiring activities move efficiently.

- Operational initiatives coordinated through Process Engineering remain visible, organized, and on track.

- Process-related issues or coordination gaps are surfaced early and addressed proactively.

- Operational documentation and updates remain clear, accurate, and accessible.

- Team follow-ups, action items, and responsibilities remain visible and properly tracked.

- You are responsive, proactive, and reliable in execution.



Why You’ll Love This Role



- Fully Remote, Flexible Hours: Work from anywhere in the Philippines with minimal overlap with U.S. hours.

- Merit-Based Rewards: Pay and promotions are tied to your results and impact.

- Clear Growth Paths: Grow into leadership or deepen expertise in People Ops or Process Engineering.

- Skill Development Focus: Access coaching, online courses, and stretch projects to build your career.



What We Offer



- Professional Development Budget

- Inclusive and collaborative team culture

- HMO

- Equipment subsidy

- Annual performance-based pay increases

- Year-end bonus

- 1-month structured onboarding program



How to Apply



- Submit via this form: 
/app7NwwAXu0h3NTtW/shrrPhalrcg1fk795

- Only applications through the form will be reviewed.

title: Real Estate Social Media Manager & Website VA
description:
JOB AD - REAL ESTATE VIRTUAL ASSISTANT (Work from Home)

Position: Real Estate Social Media Manager & Website VA

Location: 100% Remote - Work from Home

Client: Australian Real Estate Agency - Canberra & Sydney

Start: Immediate



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are an Australian real estate agency specialising in house and land packages in Canberra ACT and Sydney NSW. We are looking for an experienced virtual assistant with a real estate background to build our website, set up all our social media platforms, and manage our online presence on an ongoing weekly basis.

This is a long-term position for the right person. We reward people who deliver real results - your pay will reflect the quality and performance of your work, not just the hours you put in.



PHASE 1 - WEBSITE & ACCOUNT SETUP (Performance-Based Payment)

You will build and set up everything from scratch. Payment for this phase is based on the quality and completeness of the work delivered - not a flat fee upfront. Once we review and approve the finished setup, payment is released in full.

Work includes:



Build a professional real estate agency website with property listings, enquiry form, and about page

Create and fully set up 2
 Business Pages with branding, cover photos, and first posts

Set up 2 Instagram business account with bio, highlights, and first 9 posts

Create 2 TikTok business account and upload images

Set up 2 WhatsApp Business with auto-reply, business hours, and catalogue

Create and verify Google Business Profile with photos and review request templates

Set up 
pany page with professional branding

Design a full brand kit in Canva - logo, colours, post templates, and banners



Payment for Phase 1: AUD $200 - released upon satisfactory completion and approval of all deliverables listed above.



PHASE 2 — ONGOING WEEKLY WORK (Performance-Based)

Once everything is set up, you will manage and grow all platforms on a weekly basis. This is an ongoing long-term role. Your weekly pay is based on performance - if you hit your targets, you get paid your full weekly rate. Consistent high performance will be rewarded with pay increases over time.

Weekly tasks include:



Post daily content across
, Instagram, and TikTok

Respond to all comments and DMs within business hours

Send weekly WhatsApp broadcasts to leads and enquiries

Update the website with new listings and blog posts

Request Google reviews from clients after each sale or enquiry

Grow followers organically through engagement and community groups

Track weekly analytics and send a short performance report every Friday

Run and monitor
 and Instagram ads when required



Weekly performance targets (to earn full weekly pay):



Minimum 10 posts published across platforms per week

All DMs and comments responded to within 3 hours during business hours

Weekly analytics report submitted every Friday without being asked

At least 10 new Google review requested per week

Measurable follower growth month on month



Pay for Phase 2: AUD $7 per hour - 7 hours per week - paid every Friday based on work completed and targets met. Hours and rate reviewed upward at 30, 60, and 90 days based on results.



PAY SUMMARY



Setup fee (Phase 1): AUD $200 - paid on approval of completed work

Weekly ongoing rate: AUD $49 per week (7 hours x $7) - paid on performance

Payment method: PayPal, Wise, or bank transfer every Friday

Pay reviews: at 30, 60, and 90 days - strong performers earn more

Bonus: additional payments available for exceptional results such as high lead generation or viral content





WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

You must have:



Real estate experience - you understand property listings, house and land packages, first home buyers, and investor language

Proven experience building websites using WordPress, Wix, or similar platforms

Hands-on experience managing
, Instagram, and TikTok business accounts for clients

Strong written English - your posts must sound natural to an Australian audience

Canva skills - able to create professional branded graphics independently

Reliable internet connection and your own computer

Available to overlap Sydney/Canberra timezone (AEST) by at least 2 to 3 hours per day

Someone who takes pride in results - not just ticking boxes



It is an advantage if you have:



Previous real estate agency experience in Australia or internationally

Experience running
 and Instagram paid ads

Video editing skills using CapCut or similar

Google Business and basic SEO knowledge

WhatsApp Business broadcast experience





HOW TO APPLY

Send your application to the
 address provided once this role is assigned.

In your message please include:



Your full name and location

A short paragraph about your real estate and social media experience

Two or three examples of websites or social media accounts you have built or managed -screenshots or links are both fine

Your answer to this question in two or three sentences: "How would you help a brand-new real estate agency in Canberra get its first 
 followers and first 
 Google reviews within 30 days?"



Applications without examples of past work will not be considered.



IMPORTANT NOTES



Payment is performance-based - deliver great work and you will be paid well and given more hours

We pay every Friday without delays for work that meets the agreed targets

This is a genuine long-term opportunity - consistent performers will have their hours and rate increased

Only apply if you have real estate and social media experience and can back it up with examples

Shortlisted applicants will be contacted within 24 hours

title: Experienced Cold Callers for Solar Home Improvement & Real Estate Sales
description:
About Us:

The State Property Organization is a fast-growing company that specializes in property management, sales, and solar home improvement. We are committed to providing top-notch services to homeowners and businesses. As part of our expansion, we are looking for motivated and experienced cold callers to join our team.



Position Overview:

We are seeking Experienced Cold Callers who have a background in solar home improvement, real estate, or both. Your main responsibility will be to contact potential clients via phone, introduce our products and services, and set appointments for our sales team.



If you have a proven track record in cold calling, a passion for customer service, and experience in the solar or real estate industries, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities:



Conduct outbound cold calls to potential clients in the solar home improvement and real estate sectors

Qualify leads and set appointments for our sales team

Build rapport with potential clients and identify their needs

Maintain accurate records of calls and client interactions in our CRM system

Meet or exceed daily/weekly/monthly lead generation targets

Stay up to date on industry trends and product knowledge



Requirements:



Minimum 2 years of cold calling experience (preferably in solar home improvement or real estate)



Excellent communication and negotiation skills

Strong command of the English language (both written and spoken)

Ability to work independently and stay motivated

Experience using CRM software (Salesforce, Zoho, HubSpot, etc.) is a plus

Detail-oriented, organized, and results-driven

Ability to handle objections and overcome resistance



Preferred Skills:



Experience in solar home improvement sales

Experience in real estate cold calling or sales

Familiarity with the Philippine market is a plus

Knowledge of basic sales techniques and lead generation strategies



What We Offer:



Competitive salary and performance-based incentives

Positive and supportive work environment

Opportunity for growth within the company

Training and development resources to help you succeed



If you are an experienced cold caller who thrives in a fast-paced environment and is passionate about solar and real estate industries, apply now!



How to Apply:

Please submit your updated resume and a brief cover letter explaining why you are the perfect fit for this position. Include any relevant experience and highlight your cold calling achievements.

title: Experienced Cold Caller & Appointment Setter (Home Improvement Focus)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Cold Caller and Appointment Setter to join our growing Home Improvement team. The ideal candidate will have a proven track record in high-volume outbound calling and exceptional sales acumen. Your primary goal will be to generate new leads, qualify homeowners for specific home improvement projects, and secure appointments for our sales consultants. This is a critical role that directly contributes to our company's growth and success.



Key Responsibilities

Execute a high volume of cold calls daily to a targeted list of potential homeowners for our home improvement services.



Master and deliver a compelling sales script while being adaptable and professional.



Skillfully qualify leads to determine homeowner needs, motivation, and timeline for potential projects.



Successfully set, confirm, and manage appointments for our field consultants.

Maintain meticulous records of all calls and interactions in our CRM system.

Provide regular reports on calling activity, success metrics, and lead status.



Must-Have Qualifications

Proven Cold Calling Success: A minimum of 1 year of experience in a dedicated cold calling or telesales role.



Industry Advantage: Prior experience in Home Improvement or a related B2C (Business-to-Consumer) sales environment is a strong plus.



Appointment Setting Expertise: Demonstrated ability to consistently and effectively secure qualified appointments.



Transferable Skills Bonus: Experience in real estate cold calling and appointment setting will be considered a significant advantage.



Exceptional Communication: Outstanding verbal communication skills with a confident, persuasive, and professional phone presence.

Goal-Orientated: Highly self-motivated, results-driven, and comfortable working in a performance-based environment.



Compensation

This role offers a highly attractive compensation structure designed to reward high performance:



The hourly wage will be competitive and commensurate with experience, and will be a primary topic of discussion during the interview process.

Weekly Salary Payment: Enjoy reliable and consistent cash flow with paychecks issued every week.



Uncapped Commission: Earn a lucrative commission of $125 per closed deal generated from your set appointments. This structure is uncapped, offering significant earning potential for top performers.



How to Apply

We appreciate you taking the time to apply. To ensure we find the best fit for this specialized role, we require the following two items:

Your current Curriculum Vitae (CV) detailing your relevant experience.

A Voice Recording created using a free service like 
. In the recording, please briefly introduce yourself and then pretend to deliver a 30-second cold call pitch for a home improvement service (e.g., roofing, windows, HVAC) of your choice.



Please attached your CV and recording when you send us a message.

We look forward to reviewing your application!

title: Full-Stack Software Developer (Python / TypeScript)
description:
We have an open-source (MIT) AI agent that lives in Slack/Teams and gives non-technical team members - QA, support, product - direct access to the codebase. No more interrupting developers for answers. Paying customers, growing revenue, self-funded.



We need one strong developer to join the team and help us scale.



# What you'll do



You build and ship. Minimal meetings. Your work splits across our product and client projects:



- **Product**: Python, TypeScript, Next.js, PostgreSQL, NATS, Docker - backend services, web apps, infrastructure, AI integrations

- **Client integrations**: Tailoring dev-agents skills and workflows for client teams - understanding their codebase and delivering something that works in production

- **Client projects**: We run dev and IT for select clients pushing the limits with AI. You'll build and maintain with us production applications using AI alongside core product work



Multiple codebases, real users, real production. Claude Code MAX is part of our daily workflow.



# Who you are



- **4+ years production software** in Python and/or TypeScript

- You think in **systems**, not syntax - you spot where things break before they break

- **Thorough**: clean PRs, clear commits, edge cases covered

- **Clear writer** - in an async team, your writing is how people know you

- You **figure things out** without waiting to be told what to do next



Nice to have: Next.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, NATS, LLM integrations, open-source contributions, experience owning features end-to-end in small teams.



# What you get



- **Full-time team member** on contractor basis (40h/week, monthly invoice)

- **Fully remote**, async-first, we work in the CET-timezone, we should have at least a couple of hours overlap

- **Equity participation long-term** - for the right person, this isn't just a contract

- Your role and compensation **grow as the company scales**



# How to apply



1. Include your CV

2. GitHub or portfolio links are helpful

3. Short answer (3-5 sentences): *"Describe what is important to you to create stable and maintainable software."*

4. Include the word **"Lighthouse"** somewhere in your message



We read every application personally. 



**Timeline:** We respond to all applications within 5 business days.

title: REMOTE SETTING CALLER FOR UPSELLS — EARN $500-1000/WEEK (MALE ONLY)
description:

COMPENSATION

$
weekly. We’ll talk about it first hand before doing a trial once your application has been retained.



SCHEDULE

Full-time: 40 hours/week

You pick your 8-hour window during 9AM to 12PM UK TIME



WHAT YOU MUST HAVE — NO EXCEPTIONS

Crystal-clear spoken and written English Our clients are international. You'll be on the phone with people across Europe and beyond. We need someone with an o
 english and as little accent as possible.

Full time job. We need you to be available 40 hours a week

Solid internet You're on calls. Dropped connections kill 
ntum and kill deals. Mobile data backup is required.

 or WhatsApp:

 JOB OVERVIEW

About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: AI Specialist – Real-Time Video Rendering & Voice Synthesis
description:
We are seeking a technical wizard specializing in Live AI Video Rendering and Audio Synthesis. You will be responsible for the technical backend of a "Proxy" system, ensuring high-fidelity, low-latency face-swaps and voice-clones during live calls. This is a role for someone who understands the deep technical side of AI media tools and knows how to keep a stream stable under pressure.



Responsibilities:



Operate and maintain real-time AI tools (e.g., DeepFaceLive, Live-Cam, or similar) with near-zero latency.



Setup and manage RVC (Retrieval-based Voice Conversion) for professional, live-cloned audio output.



Ensure perfect synchronization between video and audio during live US-based interviews.



Manage hardware or Cloud GPU servers (RunPod, Vast.ai, etc.) to ensure 100% uptime and high-quality rendering.



Compensation & Career Path:



Starting Rate: $2.50 USD per hour ($100 USD per week).



Guaranteed Evaluation Raises: Salary reviews and raises at Month 1, Month 6, and Month 12 based on performance.



Health Insurance: PhilHealth/HMO benefits provided.



13th Month Pay: Full statutory extra month of salary paid in December.



Technical Requirements:



Hardware/Infrastructure: Access to a PC with a high-end GPU (RTX 3080/40-series) OR expert proficiency in deploying and streaming via Cloud GPU rentals (RunPod/Vast.ai).



Advanced AI Knowledge: Proven experience in real-time face-swapping and live RVC voice cloning.



Streaming Logic: Understanding of virtual cameras (OBS) and low-latency audio routing.



How to Apply:

To be considered, you MUST follow these steps:



Start your application with the word "AI WIZARD".



You must use a minimum of 2 Application Points to apply for this position.



Include a screenshot of your PC Specs (GPU/CPU) OR describe your specific experience using Cloud GPU servers for live video.



(Optional but Highly Preferred) Provide a 10-15 second clip of a real-time face-swap or voice-clone you have successfully executed.



Skills Requirement:



Artificial Intelligence (AI Video/Audio)



Cloud Computing (RunPod / Vast.ai)



Advanced OBS / Virtual Camera Management

title: Amazon PPC Specialist
description:
About the Company

We are a growing E-commerce company based in the Netherlands. We are market leaders in our niche locally and have recently expanded into the German (DE) market at the start of 2026. We specialize in Home Improvement and Kitchen products, and we are looking for a data-driven PPC expert to help us scale our presence across Europe.



The Role

We are looking for a heavy hitter. We currently have over 100+ ASINs. Your initial mission will be to take full control of 7 core product families. Once we achieve the target profitability (ACoS/TACOS) on these, we will systematically roll out the remaining 50+ product families.



Crucially, we are looking for a specialist who has a proven track record of managing high-volume accounts. You should have experience managing brands generating €200,000+ in monthly revenue.



Requirements

Experience: Minimum 5+ years of proven Amazon PPC experience.



Niche Expertise: Direct experience in the Home Improvement or Kitchen categories is a must.



Market Knowledge: Experience managing campaigns in the EU market (NL, DE, etc.) is highly preferred.



Strategy: Ability to handle keyword research, competitor harvesting, bid management, and Dayparting.



Tools: Mastery of Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or similar PPC management software.



Ethics: We don't mind if you have other clients, provided they are not direct competitors in our niche.



Key Responsibilities

Audit and optimize existing campaigns for our 7 priority product families.



Scale advertising profitably to meet specific TACOS targets.



Provide weekly reporting on spend, sales, ACoS, and organic ranking improvements.



Strategic expansion of our catalog as profitability milestones are met.



What We Offer

Long-term partnership with a stable, growing European brand.



Clear KPIs and a structured rollout plan (no guessing games).



Flexible working hours (as long as deadlines and performance are met).



How to Apply

To ensure you’ve read this post thoroughly, please start your application with the word "ORANGE" and include the following:



A brief summary of your experience in the Home Improvement/Kitchen niche.



An example/case study of a brand you scaled in the EU market.

References to old or current clients is a pre.



Which PPC tools you currently use.



Your desired monthly rate or hourly expectation.

title: Pre-Sales Proposal Specialist (Digital Marketing) — Google Docs
description:
About Warren Digital

Warren Digital is a performance-driven digital agency working with service businesses (including home builders) to generate quality leads and long-term growth through Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO, and conversion-focused websites.



The Role

We’re looking for a Pre-Sales Proposal Specialist who can take a strategy brief from our director and turn it into a client-ready, beautifully formatted proposal in Google Docs — fast.



You won’t be on client calls. Your job is to convert a brief into a proposal that sells: clear, persuasive, well-structured, and on-brand.



What you’ll do



Turn a brief + notes into a complete proposal (Google Docs)



Write benefit-led strategy recommendations across:



Google Ads (search + lead gen)



Meta Ads (cold, lookalike, retargeting)



SEO (local authority + content strategy)



Website/CRO (landing pages, messaging, forms)



Present budgets, ranges, and phased rollouts cleanly



Keep proposals consistent with our tone, structure, and brand



Create and improve templates, blocks, and reusable sections over time



Turnaround expectations



Most proposals delivered within 24–48 hours (often faster)



You’re a great fit if you have



2+ years writing proposals for digital marketing services (agency or freelance)



Strong sales copywriting and positioning skills



Excellent Google Docs skills (styles, templates, formatting, tables)



Great eye for design, hierarchy, and readability



Comfortable working from a voice note / Loom / bullet brief



Bonus points



Experience with home builders, trades, or high-ticket local lead gen



Understanding of performance metrics (CPC, CPL, CVR, ROAS)



Ability to build proposal systems/templates that scale



How to apply

Please send:



1–3 examples of proposals you’ve written (redacted is fine)



Your availability and typical turnaround time



Your rate (per proposal or hourly)



A short note on your experience with Google Ads / Meta / SEO proposals

title: Freelance Shopify Developer (Ongoing Support Partner)
description:
We are looking for a reliable, experienced freelance Shopify developer to support our e-commerce store on an ongoing, as-needed basis.



This is a long-term working relationship, not a full-time hire. We want to build a trusted partnership with one or two developers we can consistently rely on for website improvements, troubleshooting, and custom development work.



Remote candidates are preferred.



About the Role



We regularly need technical Shopify support for tasks that go beyond what our internal team can complete, including:



Theme edits and customizations



Coding support and bug fixing



App integrations and troubleshooting



Performance improvements and technical clean-up



Rather than working with agencies or rotating freelancers, we want a dependable developer who understands our store over time and can provide consistent support when needed.



Key Responsibilities



Shopify theme editing and customization



Working with Liquid (Shopify templating language)



Front-end development using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript



App integrations, troubleshooting, and resolving conflicts



Fixing bugs, layout issues, and mobile responsiveness problems



Performance optimization and site speed improvements



Supporting ongoing site enhancements and feature requests



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



Highly experienced with Shopify development (not just basic setup)



Strong in Liquid, theme architecture, and front-end implementation



Comfortable diagnosing issues and proposing solutions



Reliable, responsive, and able to meet reasonable turnaround times



A clear communicator who can work well with a remote team



Experienced supporting mid- to high-AOV e-commerce brands (preferred)



Preferred Candidate Profile



Priority will be given to developers based in regions with strong technical talent and reasonable pricing, such as:



Eastern Europe



Southeast Asia



South America



We generally avoid high-cost regions (UK/US) unless exceptional value is demonstrated.



Screening Questions (Required in Application)



Please include answers to the following:



What Shopify stores or projects have you worked on recently? (Links/examples preferred)



What is your experience with Liquid and custom theme development?



Are you comfortable troubleshooting app conflicts and complex store setups?



What is your typical availability and turnaround time for small fixes?



Do you work hourly, project-based, or both? Please share your rate range.



What time zone are you in, and are you comfortable working asynchronously?



Engagement Structure



Ongoing freelance support



Work assigned on an as-needed basis (small edits to larger custom tasks)



Potential to become our long-term go-to Shopify partner



How to Apply



Please apply with:



A short introduction



Relevant Shopify experience



Examples of past work



Answers to the screening questions above



We are reviewing candidates on a rolling basis and will shortlist for a quick interview/chat.



Thank you — we look forward to finding a strong long-term development partner.

title: Growth Marketing & Partnerships Assistant (Advertorials, Influencer Outreach, Affiliate Marketing)
description:
We are a fast-growing women's health and wellness brand focused on hormonal health education and science-backed products. Our mission is to help women understand and optimize their hormones through clinically supported solutions and expert education.



We are looking for a highly proactive Growth Marketing Assistant to help us scale customer acquisition through advertorial funnels, influencer partnerships, and affiliate marketing. This is a hands-on execution role working directly with the founder.



The Role

You will help us launch and test new growth channels quickly, including:



• advertorial marketing funnels

•
 ad page setup

• influencer and creator partnerships

• affiliate program management

• landing page creation and optimization



We move fast and test quickly. The right candidate is organized, scrappy, detail-oriented, and comfortable experimenting.



Key Responsibilities

1. Advertorial Funnel Creation

Create and manage advertorial landing pages that educate customers before they reach the product page.



Tasks include:



• Creating advertorial pages such as

“6 Reasons Why…” style articles

educational landing pages

editorial-style product explainers



• Using AI tools (Claude or ChatGPT) to generate:

copy drafts

page structure

wireframes



• Working with designers to implement pages

• Testing multiple advertorial versions to improve conversions

• Linking advertorials to: product pages, checkout, Amazon listings

• Tracking performance and suggesting improvements.



2. Domain & Ad Page Setup

Help create new marketing domains and ad accounts.

Tasks include:



• Managing marketing domains

• Setting up
 pages associated with those domains

• Creating ad accounts tied to those pages

• Adding legal disclaimers and brand information

• Uploading profile images and branding assets.



3. Landing Page Creation

Build and optimize landing pages for campaigns.

Tools may include:



• PageDeck or similar builders

• Shopify pages

• landing page tools



Responsibilities:

• Create landing pages from wireframes

• implement CTAs and purchase links

• add tracking pixels

• ensure pages load quickly and function correctly.



4. Tracking & Pixel Management

Ensure marketing data is properly tracked.



Tasks include:



• Installing tracking pixels on pages (Meta, TikTok, etc.)

• checking conversion tracking

• verifying data accuracy

• reporting results from campaigns.



5. Influencer & Creator Outreach

Identify and partner with creators who can feature our products in their content.



Tasks include:

• Finding creators on: TikTok, Instagram, YouTube

• Contacting creators for partnerships.



6. Creator Partnership Management

Manage influencer collaborations from start to finish.

Responsibilities include:

• negotiating CPM-based payments

• coordinating content timelines

• ensuring creators tag our brand

• tracking impressions and performance

• managing creator relationships.



7. Affiliate Program Management

Help scale our affiliate marketing program.



Tasks include:

• recruiting new affiliates

• onboarding them into platforms

• managing payouts and tracking

• monitoring performance.



Tools You Will Use

Examples include:



• AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT)

•
 Ads Manager

• landing page builders (PageDeck or similar)

• affiliate platforms

• influencer databases

• Google Sheets / Notion.



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• has experience in digital marketing or growth marketing

• is extremely organized and detail-oriented

• is comfortable using AI tools

• enjoys testing marketing experiments quickly

• has very strong English communication skills

• is proactive and independent.



Bonus if you have experience with:



• advertorial marketing

• landing page optimization

• affiliate marketing

• influencer outreach

•
 ads setup.

title: Membership Sales Specialist
description:
The Opportunity

We are seeking high-energy, results-oriented sales professionals to join the PreSale Pros team.



As a Membership Sales Specialist, you will be instrumental in launching new Hammer & Nails franchise locations by

building their founding member base.



This is more than a sales role; you are the first point of contact for potential members, setting the tone for a luxury experience before the shop even opens its doors.



What You’ll Do

Drive pre-opening membership sales: Contact warm leads via phone, text, and
 to explain Hammer &

Nails’ Founding Membership packages and convert interest into sign-ups.



Be the voice of the brand: Represent the luxury, confidence, and hospitality of Hammer & Nails in every interaction.



Manage your sales pipeline: Track outreach activity, notes, and conversions using CRM tools (e.g.,

Monday.com, HubSpot, or similar).



Collaborate with franchise owners: Work directly with local owners to align on weekly goals, promotions, and local marketing campaigns.



Hit clear, attainable targets: Help each new franchise reach 200–300 Founding Members before opening day.



Engage locally: Support community events, influencer outreach, and other brand-building efforts when needed.



Who You Are

A natural connector: You are confident on the phone, clear in writing, and great at building rapport quickly.



Results-driven: You like seeing your effort translate into growth, revenue, and community buzz.



Organized and accountable: You know how to manage a lead list and follow up consistently.



Flexible and proactive: You are comfortable working with multiple markets and adapting to each shop’s local vibe.



Relevant experience:

Experience in sales, hospitality, fitness, or membership-based services is a plus.

title: ISA Cold Caller
description:
Real Estate Cold Caller / Inside Sales Agent (ISA)

Remote | Part-Time | U.S. Real Estate

We are a growing real estate business based in Washington State (USA) looking for a reliable and confident Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to help us connect with homeowners and set appointments.

This role focuses on outbound calls to property owners using a structured call list and script.

We are building a long-term system and are looking for someone who is professional, organized, and comfortable speaking with people on the phone.

________________________________________

What You’ll Be Doing

• Calling homeowners from prepared lead lists

• Following a structured call script

• Identifying homeowners interested in selling

• Setting appointments for our real estate agent

• Recording clear notes after each call

• Submitting a daily call report

You will not be responsible for closing deals — your role is to start conversations and identify opportunities.

________________________________________

Schedule

Part-time to start.

Typical calling hours will be:

4:00 PM – 7:00 PM PST

Monday – Friday

Additional hours may be added as the team grows.

________________________________________

What We’re Looking For

Ideal candidates have:

• Experience with cold calling or inside sales

• Clear, neutral English speaking voice

• Confident conversational skills

• Comfortable handling objections

• Ability to follow a script while sounding natural

• Strong attention to detail when taking notes

• Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

Real estate experience is a plus but not required.

________________________________________

Compensation

We offer:

• Competitive hourly pay

• Performance bonuses for successful appointments

• Opportunity for long-term work with a growing real estate team

Specific compensation details will be discussed during the interview process.

________________________________________

Tools You’ll Be Using

• CRM system (BoldTrail)

• Dialer system

• Prepared call lists and scripts

• Structured reporting system

We provide the systems — you bring the professionalism and communication skills.

________________________________________

How to Apply

To apply, please include:

1?? A short voice recording introducing yourself

2?? Your experience with cold calling or sales

3?? Your internet speed test result

4?? The word “Spring Prospecting” in the subject line

Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

________________________________________

Who We Are

We are a relationship-focused real estate business that values professionalism, integrity, and clear systems.

We believe great conversations lead to great opportunities, and we are building a team that helps homeowners make smart decisions about their property.

title: Auditor (External Auditor)
description:

Bachelor degree in Finance, Accountancy, Accounting Technology.

Good command of written and spoken English

Candidates with relevant experience who can begin work immediately will be prioritized.

Knowledge of Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, Google Docs.

title: Inpatient Coder (CCS, CIC, CPC) 100K SOB!
description:
COMPANY DESCRIPTION



At Coronis Health, we specialize in revenue cycle management (RCM) with a focus on simplifying complexities for healthcare providers to enable them to deliver exceptional patient care. We offer tailored solutions for billing optimization, claims management, and actionable insights to support growth and scalability for each unique practice. Coronis Health is trusted by thousands of healthcare organizations nationwide for managing medical billing and RCM operations. Our commitment to technology, security, and innovation drives our mission to achieve financial health, operational excellence, and strategic success for our clients.



JOB SUMMARY



Under the general supervision of the Operations Manager, the Coder assigns diagnosis and procedure codes to patient medical records and enters coding and abstracting patient data into the facility computer system. Generally, performs coding on all types of cases. Position can be specialized to code inpatient, outpatient, or physician/ professional coding, but must be able to code all patient types depending on business requirements. Appropriately code for International Classification of Diseases 10th Revision–Clinical Modification (ICD-10-CM)/diagnosis, and Procedure Codes such as Current Procedural Terminology (CPT), International Classification of Diseases 10th Revision–Procedure Coding System (ICD-10-PCS), or Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS). related to a patient’s admission in order to provide billing and statistical information. The work of this position is guided by defined policies, guidelines, and established practices and precedents. The method of chart analysis normally required to solve problems or make decisions is to collect, compile, and organize facts, figures and/or other information in accordance with established procedures or as directed by facility policy. This position is responsible to adhere to all federal guidelines as set forth by CMS and State guidelines, and as per coding rules and guidelines set in the AHA Coding Clinics. The Medical Coder must be able to meet a minimum of 95% quality and productivity target set by the organization or by the client.



ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Abstracts, codes, and sequences the classification of medical and surgical procedures, diagnosis, and treatment modalities on Inpatient and Day Surgeries. 



2. Reviews appropriate provider documentation to determine principal diagnosis, co-morbidities and complications, secondary conditions, and surgical procedures. 



3. Selects the latest, most accurate, and descriptive codes per specialty:

For the Inpatient specialty



 i. ICD-10-CM for diagnosis coding, ICD-10-PCS for procedure coding



 ii. Assigns Present on Admission (POA) value for inpatient diagnoses as a supplement for ICD-10-CM coding. 



 iii. Assigns correct Principal Diagnosis, Secondary Diagnosis, especially those that are Comorbid Complication (CC) and/or Major Comorbid Complication (MCC)



 iv. Assigns correct Diagnosis-Related Grouping (DRG) and performs coding compliance reviews. Follow official coding guidelines to review and analyze health records. 



4. Writes a compliant query to the provider for documentation and coding improvement.



5. Enters codes into the computer system, extracts required information from source documentation, and enter data into encoder and abstracting system.



6. Reports to their supervisor their productivity status and daily issues.



7. Identifies and reports areas of concern with respect to improper coding and documentation.



8. Maintains confidentiality of patient records at all times.



JOB QUALIFICATIONS



Education or equivalency:

• Bachelor’s Degree in Medical Records or Allied Medical Field



Experience: 

• Requires a minimum of 3 years of inpatient coding experience, with six months which were live accounts with a client. 

• A working knowledge of Inpatient coding requirements. 



Certification/licensure: 

• Certification is dependent on the client's requirement.

 o AAPC Coding Certification: CPC, CIC

 o AHIMA Coding Certification: CCA, CCS-P, CCS
